description: Derived Flag (--DRVFL) variable may be populated only when Result in Original Units (--ORRES) value is NULL and Result in Std. Format (--STRESC) value is populated (result is derived rather than collected).

message: No Details info for AESMIE Adverse Event in SUPPAE domain
description: When a description of Other Medically Important Serious Adverse Events category is collected on a CRF, sponsors should place the description in the SUPPAE dataset using the standard supplemental qualifier name code AESOSP.

message: MHSTDTC date is after RFSTDTC
description: The medical history dataset includes the subject's prior history at the start of the trial. Start Date/Time of Medical History Event (MHSTDTC) should be before Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).

message: Missing --PRESP variable, when --OCCUR variable is present
description: Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable should be included into dataset, when Occurrence (--OCCUR) variable is present. (--PRESP/Events) Used to indicate whether the event describe by --TERM was pre-specified on a CRF.  Value is Y for pre-specified events, null for spontaneously reported events. (--PRESP/Interventions) Used when a specific intervention is pre-specified on a CRF. Values should be 'Y' or null. (--OCCUR) Used to record whether a pre-specified event occurred when information about the occurrence of a specific event is solicited.

message: Expected variable with missing value for all records
description: Expected variables may contain some null values, but in most cases will not contain null values for every record. When no data has been collected for an Expected variable, however, a null column must still be included in the dataset, and a comment must be included in the define.xml to state that data was not collected.
domains: CO, INTERVENTIONS, EVENTS, FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Inconsistent value for IETESTCD within IETEST
description: All values of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name  (IETESTCD) should be the same for a given value of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion (IETEST).

message: Duplicate records in domain
description: The structure of Events class domains should be one records per Event per subject. No Events with the same Collected Term (--TERM), Decoded Term (--DECOD), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Occurrence (--OCCUR), Location (--LOC), Laterality (--LAT), Directionality (--DIR), Severity (--SEV), Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR), Visit Number (VISITNUM), Visit Day (VISITDY), and Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) values for the same Subject (USUBJID) and the same Start Date (--STDTC) are expected.

description: Device Type (DEVTYPE) Parameter must be populated for each Medical Device in the Device Identifiers (DI) domain.

message: Neither SPDEVID nor USUBJID values are populated
description: Value for Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID) or Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variables should be populated for all records in Divice In-Use (DU) domain

message: Duplicate value for --SEQ variable
description: The value of Sequence Number (--SEQ) variable must be unique for each record within a domain and within each combination of Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID) and Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variables' values.

message: Duplicate records in Device Property
description: There should be one record per device property defined by SPDEVID and DOTESTCD variables

message: --RFTDTC is populated when --TPTREF is not populated
description: --RFTDTC is defined as the Date/time for a fixed reference time point defined by --TPTREF, therefore --RFTDTC should only be populated when --TPTREF is populated.

message: No Informed Consent Obtained record in DS domain for subject
description: All subjects should have an Informed Consent record in the Disposition domain.

message: --BODSYS is not populated when --BDSYCD is populated
description: Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS) must be populated when Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD) is populated.

message: Inconsistent value for --BODSYS within --BDSYCD
description: All values of Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS) should be the same for a given value of Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD).

message: Inconsistent value for --BDSYCD within --BODSYS
description: All values of Body System or Organ Class Code (--BDSYCD) should be the same for a given value of Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS).

message: Missing --TPT variable, when --TPTNUM variable is present
description: Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable must be included into the domain, when Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable is present.

message: Missing --TPTREF variable, when --ELTM variable is present
description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable must be included into the domain, when Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) variable is present.

message: ECDOSE is not greater than 0 when ECOCCUR does not equal 'N' and ECDOSTXT is null
description: ECDOSE must be greater than zero when ECOCCUR does not equal 'N' , ECSTAT does not equal 'NOT DONE', and ECDOSTXT is null. ECDOSE must not be set to zero (0) as an alternative method for indicating doses not taken, not given, or missed.

message: ECDOSE is not null or greater than 0 when ECOCCUR = 'N'
description: ECDOSE must either be null when ECOCCUR equals 'N', or ECDOSE must be greater than 0. ECDOSE would be greater than 0 (when ECOCCUR equals N) for records that represent specific dose amounts that are not taken, not given, or missed.

message: EXDOSE does not equal 0 when EXTRT = 'PLACEBO'
description: EXDOSE must be equal to 0 when EXTRT = 'PLACEBO'.

message: Missing --TPTNUM variable, when --TPT variable is present
description: Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable must be included into the domain, when Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) variable is present.

message: --VAMTU is not null when --TRTV is null
description: Treatment Vehicle Amount Units (--VAMTU) value must be null when Treatment Vehicle Amount (--TRTV) value is null.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when SS.SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'
description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Subject Status (SS) domain with SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'.

message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when DD record is present
description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Death Details (DD) domain.

message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when AE.AEOUT = 'FATAL'
description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Adverse Events (AE) domain with AEOUT = 'FATAL'.

message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when AE.AESDTH = 'Y'
description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Adverse Events (AE) domain with AESDTH = 'Y'.

message: DTHFL does not equal 'Y' when DS.DSDECOD = 'DEATH'
description: DTHFL must equal 'Y' when there is a record in the Disposition (DS) domain with DSDECOD = 'DEATH'.

message: RFSTDTC is populated for subject who did not receive treatment
description: RFSTDTC must be null when actual arm indicates that the subject is a screen failure ('Screen Failure'), was not assigned to an arm ('Not Assigned'), was not treated ('NOTTRT'), or actual arm is null. This rule applies to studies where RFSTDTC is associated with a treatment date.

message: Invalid value for SETCD
description: The value of Set Code (SETCD) should be no more than 8 characters in length.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: TSVCDVER is null when Reference Terminology is versioned
description: The Version of the Reference Terminology variable (TSVCDVER) should be populated with the version number of the Reference Terminology, when that Reference Terminology is versioned.

message: SSDTC is not greater than or equal to DTHDTC, when SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'
description: Subject Status Date/Time of Assessment (SSDTC) must be greater than or equal to Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) when the subject's status is 'DEAD'.

message: SSDTC is not greater than or equal to DSSTDTC, when SSSTRESC = 'DEAD'
description: Subject Status Date/Time of Assessment (SSDTC) must be greater than or equal to Start Date/Time of Disposition Event (DSSTDTC) when the subject's status is 'DEAD'.

message: MBRESCAT is null when MBTESTCD = 'ORGANISM'
description: MBRESCAT is expected to be populated in all records where a microorganism has been identified (MBTESTCD = 'ORGANISM'), excluding records where MBSTRESC equals 'NO GROWTH' or MBMETHOD equals 'GRAM STAIN'.

message: IDVAR equals --SEQ when IDVARVAL is null and USUBJID is null
description: When the RELREC dataset is used to identify relationships between datasets (in which case USUBJID and IDVARVAL are left null), instead of relating individual records, --SEQ cannot be used for IDVAR because --SEQ only has meaning within a subject within a dataset, not across datasets.

message: QEVAL is null when QORIG equals 'ASSIGNED'
description: For subjective data (when QORIG='ASSIGNED'), QEVAL should be populated and the value should reflect the role of the person or institution assigning the value.

message: ETCD equals 'UNPLAN' when SEUPDES is null
description: When the Description of Unplanned Element (SEUPDES) is not populated, the Element Code (ETCD) should not be equal to 'UNPLAN'.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Invalid value for TAETORD
description: Planned Order of Element within Arm (TAETORD) variable value must be an integer.

message: TSVCDREF is null when TSVCDVER is populated
description: The Name of the Reference Terminology (TSVCDREF) must be populated when the Version of the Reference Terminology (TSVCDVER) is populated.

message: TSVAL is not between 0 and 1, when TSPARMCD = 'RANDQT'
description: For the trial summary parameter Randomization Quotient (TSPARMCD = 'RANDQT'), the value must always be a number between 0 and 1, with some cases where the ratio might be equal to 1.

message: Missing PC dataset, when PP dataset is present
description: Pharmacokinetic Concentrations (PC) dataset should be included, when a Pharmacokinetic Parameters(PP) dataset is present.

message: The combination of ELEMENT, TESTRL TEENRL, and TEDUR is not unique for each ETCD
description: The combination of Description of Element (ELEMENT), Rule for Start of Element (TESTRL), Rule for End of Element (TEENRL), and Planned Duration of Element (TEDUR) should be unique for each Element Code (ETCD).

message: --TESTCD equals 'OTHER'
description: Test Code variables (--TESTCD) should not be populated with values of 'OTHER'.

message: --TRT equals 'OTHER'
description: Name of Treatment variables (--TRT) should not be populated with values of 'OTHER'.

message: --TERM equals 'OTHER'
description: Reported Term variables (--TERM) should not be populated with values of 'OTHER'.

message: --TESTCD equals 'MULTIPLE'
description: Test Code variables (--TESTCD) should not be populated with values of 'MULTIPLE'.

message: --TRT equals 'MULTIPLE'
description: Name of Treatment variables (--TRT) should not be populated with values of 'MULTIPLE'.

message: --TERM equals 'MULTIPLE'
description: Reported Term variables (--TERM) should not be populated with values of 'MULTIPLE'.

message: Inconsistent value for TSVALCD within TSVAL
description: Parameter Value Code (TSVALCD) and Parameter Value (TSVAL) should have a one-to-one relationship.

message: ECDOSTXT is null when ECDOSE is null and ECOCCUR does not equal 'N'
description: Dose Description (ECDOSTXT) should be populated when Dose (ECDOSE) is null, ECOCCUR does not equal 'N', and ECSTAT does not equal 'NOT DONE'.

message: --TOX variable is present when --TOXGR variable is missing
description: Toxicity (--TOX) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR) variable is missing.

message: --TPTREF variable is present when --ELTM, --TPTNUM, and --TPT are missing
description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) variable, Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) variable, and Planned Time Point (--TPT) variable are missing.

message: --LAT variable is present when --LOC variable is missing
description: Laterality (--LAT) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Location (--LOC) variable is missing.

message: --PORTOT variable is present when --LOC variable is missing
description: Portion or Totality (--PORTOT) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Location (--LOC) variable is missing.

message: --DIR variable is present when --LOC variable is missing
description: Directionality (--DIR) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Location (--LOC) variable is missing.

message: IETESTCD is not unique within TIVERS
description: A value of Incl/Excl Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD) must be unique within a version of inclusion/exclusion criteria (TIVERS).

message: Inconsistent value for --DECOD within --PTCD
description: All values of Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) should be the same for a given value of Preferred Term Code (--PTCD).

message: Inconsistent value for --PTCD within --DECOD
description: All values of Preferred Term Code (--PTCD) should be the same for a given value of Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD).

message: Missing value for --DECOD, when --PTCD is populated
description: Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) should be populated when Preferred Term Code (--PTCD) is populated.

message: Multiple disposition events for the same EPOCH
description: If multiple disposition events are reported for an EPOCH, the sponsor should identify a primary reason and use that to populate DSTERM and DSDECOD. Additional reasons should be submitted in SUPPDS.

message: Missing value for --ENRTPT, when --ENTPT is populated
description: End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) must be populated when End Reference Time Point (--ENTPT) is populated.

message: Missing value for --STRTPT, when --STTPT is populated
description: Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) must be populated when Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) is populated.

message: --REASND variable is present when --PRESP variable is missing
description: Reason Not Done (--REASND) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable is missing.

message: --STAT variable is present when --PRESP variable is missing
description: Completion Status (--STAT) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Pre-specified (--PRESP) variable is missing.

message: Invalid TSVAL value for ADDON parameter
description: TSVAL for ADDON record must be 'Y' or 'N'.

message: Invalid TSVAL value for ADAPT parameter
description: TSVAL for ADAPT record must be 'Y' or 'N'.

message: TSVAL is populated with a value from the ISO 21090 null flavor codelist
description: TSVAL should not be populated with a value from the ISO 21090 null flavor codelist, or synonyms of the values. The TSVALNF variable should be used to capture these values, not TSVAL.

message: LBTOXGR is not a numeric value when a numeric scale is used.
description: When a numeric scale is used (Grade 1, Grade 2, etc.), LBTOXGR should only contain the number.

message: No timing variables are present in dataset
description: All domains based on the general observation classes (Interventions, Events, Findings) should have at least one Timing variable present.
domains: INTERVENTIONS, EVENTS, FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT, NOT(IE, SC)

message: Invalid value for DOMAIN variable
description: The value of DOMAIN should be no more than 2 characters in length, excluding Associated Persons domains.

message: Invalid value for TDSTOFF variable
description: Offset from the Anchor (TDSTOFF) variable value must be either 0, ISO 8601 format for duration (e.g. P80Y), or null.

message: The TDIGRP Trial Summary Parameter is not provided with TSVAL equal to null, when HLTSUBJI parameter equals 'Y'
description: When the study population is healthy subjects (TSPARMCD = 'HLTSUBJI' and TSVAL = 'Y'), the Diagnosis Group parameter should be provided with a null Parameter Value (TSVAL should be null when TSPARMCD = 'TDIGRP').

message: TSVAL is missing for the TDIGRP Trial Summary Parameter, when HLTSUBJI parameter equals 'N'
description: When the study population is not healthy subjects (TSPARMCD = 'HLTSUBJI' and TSVAL = 'N'), the Diagnosis Group parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'TDIGRP').

message: TSVAL is missing for the CURTRT Trial Summary Parameter, when ADDON parameter equals 'Y'
description: When test product is added to existing treatment (TSPARMCD = 'ADDON' and TSVAL = 'Y'), the Current Therapy or Treatment parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'CURTRT').

message: TSVAL is missing for the TRT Trial Summary Parameter, when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Investigational Therapy or Treatment parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'TRT').

message: TSVAL is missing for the INTMODEL Trial Summary Parameter, when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Intervention Model parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'INTMODEL').

message: TSVAL is missing for the INTTYPE Trial Summary Parameter, when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Intervention Type parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'INTTYPE').

message: TSVAL is missing for the PCLAS Trial Summary Parameter, when STYPE parameter equals 'INTERVENTIONAL'
description: When the study type is interventional (TSPARMCD = 'STYPE' and TSVAL = 'INTERVENTIONAL'), the Pharmacologic Class parameter should be provided with Parameter Value populated (TSVAL should not be null when TSPARMCD = 'PCLAS').

message: Missing EPOCH value, when DSCAT is 'DISPOSITION EVENT'
description: Epoch (EPOCH) variable should be provided, when Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) equals 'DISPOSITION EVENT'.

message: DSDECOD is not 'COMPLETED', when DSTERM='COMPLETED'
description: When Reported Term for the Disposition Event (DSTERM) is 'COMPLETED', Standardized Disposition Term (DSDECOD) should have the same value 'COMPLETED'.

message: DSDECOD is not the same as DSTERM, when DSCAT='PROTOCOL MILESTONE'
description: Reported Term for the Disposition Event (DSTERM) and Standardized Disposition Term (DSDECOD) should contain the same value, when Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) is 'PROTOCOL MILESTONE'.

message: Missing 'DEATH' record for subject in DS domain
description: All subjects who have Death records (SSSTRESC = 'DEAD') in Survival Status (SS) domain should also have death records (DSDECOD='DEATH') in Disposition (DS) domain.

message: DSSTDTC for DEATH record is not the same as DM.DTHDTC
description: DEATH records (DSDECOD='DEATH') in the Disposition (DS) domain should have Start Date of Event (DSSTDTC) equal to subject's Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) populated in the Demographics (DM) domain. Subject's Date/Time of Death info should be consistent across all domains.

message: No records for subject are found in DV domain
description: Subjects who have DSDECOD = 'PROTOCOL VIOLATION' or DSDECOD = 'PROTOCOL DEVIATION' records in the Disposition (DS) domain should have supportive records with details in the Protocol Deviations (DV) domain.

message: --STDTC is before RFICDTC
description: All records in the Disposition (DS) and Protocol Deviations (DV) domains should have the Start Date/Time of Event (--STDTC) equal to or after a subject's Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) in the Demographics (DM) domain.

message: Missing value for --STRESC, when --STAT is null
description: Character Result/Finding in Std Format (--STRESC) value should not be NULL, when Completion Status (--STAT) value is NULL.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: No Treatment Emergent info for Adverse Event (missing SUPPAE)
description: A treatment-emergent flag should be included in SUPPAE according to the FDA business rule that states, 'A treatment-emergent flag should be submitted.'

message: Value for COUNTRY not found in ISO 3166
description: Value for the Country (COUNTRY) variable must be populated using terms found in ISO 3166.

message: Invalid TSVAL value for FCNTRY
description: TSVAL for FCNTRY record must be a valid term from ISO 3166.

message: Define.xml/dataset variable label mismatch
description: Variable Label in define.xml must match variable Label in dataset.

message: Define.xml/dataset description mismatch
description: Dataset Description in define.xml must match dataset Description.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: RDEVID is not null when RSUBJID is populated
description: Related Device Identifier (RDEVID) and Related Subject or Pool Identifier (RSUBJID) should not both be populated for the same record.

message: RSUBJID is equal to POOLID
description: The Related Subject or Pool Identifier (RSUBJID) value should not be equal to Pool Identifier (POOLID).

message: RSUBJID is equal to USUBJID
description: The Related Subject or Pool Identifier (RSUBJID) value should not be equal to USUBJID.

message: --DY is after --ENDY
description: Study Day of Observation (--DY) must be less or equal to Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY)
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: --STDTC is after --DTC
description: Start Date/Time of Event, Exposure (--STDTC) must be less or equal to Date/Time of Collection(--DTC)
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: AEOUT = NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, but an end date is provided
description: The Outcome of Adverse Event (AEOUT) variable is populated with the value NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, however the End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) variable is populated with an end date for the adverse event. If the adverse event has an outcome of NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED, it is expected that no end date is available.

message: AEOUT = RECOVERED/RESOLVED, but an end date or collected duration is not provided
description: The Outcome of Adverse Event (AEOUT) variable is populated with the value RECOVERED/RESOLVED, however the End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) or Duration of Adverse Event (AEDUR) variables are null. If the adverse event has an outcome of RECOVERED/RESOLVED, it is expected that an end date or a collected duration be provided.

message: RFICDTC is after RFSTDTC
description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) should not be after Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).

message: RFICDTC is after RFXSTDTC
description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) should not be after Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC).

message: TRLNKID value does not exist in TU domain
description: A Link ID (TRLNKID) value for a tumor that is referenced in the Tumor Results (TR) domain for a subject must also be present in the Tumor Identification (TU) domain for that subject.

message: RSLNKID value does not exist in TR domain
description: A Link ID (RSLNKID) value for a response assessment that is referenced in the Disease Response (RS) domain for a subject must also be present in the Tumor Results (TR) domain for the appropriate measurement records for that subject.

message: RSLNKGRP value does not exist in TR domain
description: A Link Group (RSLNKGRP) value for a response assessment that is referenced in the Disease Response (RS) domain for a subject must also be present in the Tumor Results (TR) domain for the appropriate measurement records for that subject.

message: Missing EPOCH value, when a start or observation date is provided
description: The EPOCH variable is not populated, however either a start date or a collection date is provided. The presence of a start date or collection date for a record should allow for the EPOCH variable to be populated. Variables requested by the relevant regulatory agency in policy documents (e.g., EPOCH) should be included in the dataset and populated.
domains: SE, SM, INTERVENTIONS, EVENTS, FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: EX record is present, when subject is not treated
description: Subjects that are not treated (ACTARMCD='NOTTRT' or null) should not have any Exposure records. Run-in records (EPOCH='RUN-IN') are excluded from firing for this validation rule.

message: Missing value for RFXSTDTC, when RFXENDTC is provided
description: Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable must be populated, when Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC)variable value is provided.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Missing value for RFXSTDTC, when subject is treated
description: Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable must be populated, when subject is treated (ACTARMCD is not 'SCRNFAIL', 'NOTTRT', 'NOTASSGN', or null).
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Value for --DECOD not found in WHODrug dictionary
description: Value for the Standardized Medication Name (--DECOD) variable must be populated using a Drug Name from the WHO Drug dictionary version specified in the define.xml.

message: Value for --CLAS not found in WHODrug dictionary
description: Value for the Medication Class (--CLAS) variable must be populated using ATC Text from the WHO Drug dictionary version specified in the define.xml.

message: Value for --CLASCD not found in WHODrug dictionary
description: Value for the Medication Class Code (--CLASCD) variable must be populated using ATC Code from the WHO Drug dictionary version specified in the define.xml.

message: AEENDTC for fatal AE is not the same as DM.DTHDTC
description: Fatal Adverse Event records (AEOUT = 'FATAL') in the Adverse Events (AE) domain should have End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) equal to subject's Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) populated in the Demographics (DM) domain. Subject's Date/Time of Death info should be consistent across all domains.

message: Missing values for --STINT and --ENINT variables when --TEST references 'T1 to T2'
description: Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) and Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) variables should be present and populated when Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST) is over a time interval, 'T1 to T2', where 'T1' is represented by the value in --STINT and 'T2' is represented by the value in --ENINT.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Inconsistent STUDYID
description: Study Identifier (STUDYID) values should be consistent for all subjects in the Demographics (DM) domain for one study.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Missing value for --ENINT, when --STINT is provided
description: Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) should not be NULL, when Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) is populated.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Missing value for --STINT, when --ENINT is provided
description: Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) should not be NULL, when Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) is populated.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Duplicate records in domain
description: The structure of Interventions class domains should be one record per Intervention Episode per subject. No Interventions with the same Treatment (--TRT), Decoded Term (--DECOD), Mood (--MOOD), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Route (--ROUTE), Location (--LOC) and Treatment Vehicle (--TRTV) values for the same Subject (USUBJID) with the same Start Date (--STDTC), Planned Time Point Name (--TPT), and Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) are expected.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: --STRESC does not equal --ORRES when --STRESU is equal to --ORRESU
description: Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC) variable value should be equal to Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) variable value, when variable values are numeric and Standard Units (--STRESU) and Original Units (--ORRESU) are populated with the same units or are null.
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: ARMCD value not present in DM
description: Arm Code (ARMCD) values defined in Trial Arms (TA) should be assigned to at least one subject (USUBJID) in Demographics (DM).
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: Missing TM dataset, when variable MIDS is present in a dataset
description: When the Disease Milestone Instance Name (MIDS) variable is used in any dataset, the Trial Disease Milestones (TM) dataset must be present for the study.

message: Missing TM dataset, when variable RELMIDS is present in a dataset
description: When the Temporal Relation to Milestone Instance (RELMIDS) variable is used in any dataset, the Trial Disease Milestones (TM) dataset must be present for the study.

message: MIDSDTC variable is present when MIDS variable is missing
description: Disease Milestone Instance Date/Time (MIDSDTC) variable should not be present in the domain, when the Disease Milestone Instance Name (MIDS) variable is missing.

message: ARMNRS is not populated, when ACTARMCD or ACTARM is NULL
description: When Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD)/Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) are not populated, the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable must be populated with the reason ACTARMCD/ACTARM are null.

message: ARMNRS is not populated when ARMCD/ARM are not provided
description: When Planned Arm Code (ARMCD)/Description of Planned Arm (ARM) are not populated, the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable must be populated with the reason ARMCD/ARM are null.

message: ARMNRS is populated but ARMCD and ACTARMCD are populated
description: The Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable should only be populated when Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) and Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) are null.

message: ARM is populated, but ARMCD is null, or vice versa
description: Description of Planned Arm (ARM) must be populated, when Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) is populated, and vice versa.

message: ACTARM is populated, but ACTARMCD is null, or vice versa
description: Description of Actual Arm (ACTARM) must be populated, when Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) is populated, and vice versa.

message: ARMCD/ARM is populated for a subject not assigned to treatment
description: Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) and Description of Planned Arm (ARM) must not be null for subjects who are not assigned to treatment. This includes Screen Failure subjects and Not Assigned subjects.

message: ACTARMCD/ACTARM is populated for a subject who wasn't treated
description: Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) and Actual Arm (ACTARM) must be null for subjects who weren't treated. This includes Screen Failure subjects, Not Assigned subjects, and Not Treated subjects.

message: ADSL Population Flags provided in SDTM
description: ADSL Population Flags, which had standard Supplemental Qualifiers included in previous versions of the SDTMIG (COMPLT, FASFL/FULLSET, ITT, PPROTFL/PPROT, SAFFL/SAFETY, etc.) should no longer be used in SDTM.

message: RFENDTC is populated when ARMNRS is not null
description: Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC) should be null for screen failures or unassigned subjects. Therefore, when the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable is populated, RFENDTC should be null.

message: Multiple disposition events for the same DSSCAT and EPOCH
description: There should be at most one disposition event record per subject per Subcategory for Disposition Event (DSSCAT) per Epoch. If multiple disposition events are reported for a Subcategory for DSSCAT and EPOCH, the sponsor should identify a primary reason and use that to populate DSTERM and DSDECOD. Additional reasons should be submitted in SUPPDS.

message: SMSTDTC is null
description: Start Date/Time of Milestone (SMSTDTC) should not be null. The start date/time of the Disease Milestone is the critical date/time, and must be populated.

message: --STREFC is null when --ORREF is populated
description: Reference Result in Standard Format (--STREFC) should be populated when Reference Result in Original Units (--ORREF) is populated.

message: --STREFN is null when --STREFC is populated
description: Numeric Reference Result in Std Units (--STREFN) should be populated when Reference Result in Standard Format (--STREFC) is populated.

message: --ORRES is null when --LOBXFL = 'Y' (and --DRVFL is null)
description: Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) should be populated when Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) is set to 'Y', unless the record is derived (--DRVFL = 'Y').

message: --STRESC is null when --LOBXFL = 'Y'
description: Character Result/Finding in Std Format (--STRESC) should be populated when Last Observation Before Exposure Flag (--LOBXFL) is set to 'Y'.

message: RFSTDTC is populated for subject who did not receive treatment
description: RFSTDTC must be null when the Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) variable is populated (excluding values of UNPLANNED TREATMENT), which indicates that the subject did not receive treatment.

message: No Disposition record found for subject
description: All Demographics (DM) subjects (USUBJID) should have at least one record in the Disposition (DS) domain with only possible exceptions to subjects who did not receive treatment (ACTARMCD is null).

message: RFENDTC is populated for subject who did not receive treatment
description: RFENDTC must be null when actual arm indicates that the subject is a screen failure ('Screen Failure'), was not assigned to an arm ('Not Assigned'), or was not treated ('NOTTRT') (or null). This rule applies to studies where RFENDTC is associated with a treatment date.

message: RFENDTC is not provided for a treated subject
description: Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC) should be populated for all treated subjects, those where Actual Arm Code (ACTARMCD) is not equal to 'SCRNFAIL', 'NOTASSGN' or 'NOTTRT' (or null).

message: No records for SCREEN FAILURE subject are found in IE domain
description: All subjects with Reason Arm and/or Actual Arm is Null (ARMNRS) equal to 'SCREEN FAILURE' should have records in the Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met (IE) domain.

message: ETCD value not present in TA
description: Element Code (ETCD) values defined in Trial Elements (TE) should be assigned for at least one Arm Code (ARMCD) in Trial Arms (Trial Arms).
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: ETCD value not present in SE
description: Element Code (ETCD) values defined in Trial Elements (TE) should be assigned to at least one subject (USUBJID) in Subject Elements (SE).
ig_versions: SDTMIG 3.1.2; SDTMIG 3.1.3; SDTMIG 3.2; SDTMIG 3.3; SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-AR 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1

message: No subject identifier variables are populated
description: At least one of the following subject identifier variables must be populated for each record: Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Associated Persons Identifier (APID), Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID), or Pool Identifier (POOLID).
domains: CO, SV, INTERVENTIONS, EVENTS, FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT, RELSUB, SUPPQUAL

message: Incorrect value for --XDY variable
description: Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --XDY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFXSTDTC) +1 if --DTC is on or after RFXSTDTC; --XDY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFXSTDTC) if --DTC precedes RFXSTDTC.

message: Incorrect value for --XSTDY variable
description: Start Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XSTDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --XSTDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFXSTDTC) +1 if --STDTC is on or after RFXSTDTC; --XSTDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFXSTDTC) if --STDTC precedes RFXSTDTC.

message: Incorrect value for --XENDY variable
description: End Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XENDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --XENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFXSTDTC) +1 if --ENDTC is on or after RFXSTDTC; --XENDY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFXSTDTC) if --ENDTC precedes RFXSTDTC.

message: Incorrect value for --CHDY variable
description: Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --CHDY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFCSTDTC) +1 if --DTC is on or after RFCSTDTC; --CHDY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFCSTDTC) if --DTC precedes RFCSTDTC.

message: Incorrect value for --CHSTDY variable
description: Start Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHSTDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --CHSTDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFCSTDTC) +1 if --STDTC is on or after RFCSTDTC; --CHSTDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFCSTDTC) if --STDTC precedes RFCSTDTC.

message: Incorrect value for --CHENDY variable
description: End Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHENDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --CHENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFCSTDTC) +1 if --ENDTC is on or after RFCSTDTC; --CHENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFCSTDTC) if --ENDTC precedes RFCSTDTC.

message: --XDY variable value is imputed
description: Day of Obs relative to Exposure (--XDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may only be populated, when both Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) and Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variables values are provided and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --XSTDY variable value is imputed
description: Start Day of Obs relative to Exposure (--XSTDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may only be populated, when both Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) and Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variables values are provided and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --XENDY variable value is imputed
description: End Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XENDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may only be populated, when both End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) and Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variables values are provided and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --CHDY variable value is imputed
description: Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may only be populated, when both Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) and Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variables values are provided and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --CHSTDY variable value is imputed
description: Start Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHSTDY) variable value should not be imputed. message: --CHENDY variable value is imputed
description: End Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHENDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may only be populated, when both End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) and Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variables values are provided and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --XDY variable value is not populated
description: Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XDY) variable value should be populated, when Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) and Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --XSTDY variable value is not populated
description: Start Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XSTDY) variable value should be populated, when Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) and Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --XENDY variable value is not populated
description: End Day of Obs Relative to Exposure (--XENDY) variable value should be populated, when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) and Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --CHDY variable value is not populated
description: Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHDY) variable value should be populated, when Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) and Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --CHSTDY variable value is not populated
description: Start Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHSTDY) variable value should be populated, when Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) and Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both of them include complete date parts.

message: --CHENDY variable value is not populated
description: End Day of Obs Rel to Challenge Agent (--CHENDY) variable value should be populated, when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) and Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both of them include complete date parts.

message: AGSTDTC date is before RFCSTDTC
description: Start Date/Time of Agent (AGSTDTC) variable value must be greater than or equal to Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC).

message: AGSTDTC date is after RFCENDTC
description: Start Date/Time of Agent (AGSTDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of Last Challenge Agent Admin (RFCENDTC).

message: AGENDTC date is after RFCENDTC
description: End Date/Time of Agent (AGENDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of Last Challenge Agent Admin (RFCENDTC).

message: RFCSTDTC date is after RFCENDTC
description: Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variable value must be less than or equal to Date/Time of Last Challenge Agent Admin (RFCENDTC).

message: Missing value for RFCENDTC, when RFCSTDTC is provided
description: Value for Date/Time of Last Challenge Agent Admin  (RFXENDTC) variable must be populated, when Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFXSTDTC) variable value is provided.

message: Missing value for RFCSTDTC, when RFCENDTC is provided
description: Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) variable must be populated, when Date/Time of Last Challenge Agent Admin (RFXENDTC) variable value is provided.

message: Missing CAGTCAT Challenge Agent Parameter
description: 'Challenge Agent Category' (CAGTCAT) record must be populated in Challenge Agent Characterization (AC) domain.

message: Missing CAGTSUPA Challenge Agent Parameter
description: 'Challenge Agent Supplier Address' (CAGTSUPA) record must be populated in Challenge Agent Characterization (AC) domain.

message: Missing CAGTSUPN Challenge Agent Parameter

message: Multiple BASELINE records for the same test
description: By its definition clinical baseline flags (e.g., last non-missing value prior to first dose) should have only a single record for the same test for subject. Therefore, each subject (USUBJID) should have no more than one record with Baseline Flag (--BLFL) equals 'Y' for the same assessment which is defined by Test (--TESTCD), Category (--CAT), Subcategory (--SCAT), Method (--METHOD), Specimen (--SPEC), Location (--LOC), Laterality (--LAT) and Directionality (--DIR).

message: Inconsistent value for --TPTNUM within --TPT, --DY, --CAT and/or --SCAT

The NY codelist should be used to populate TSVAL when TSPARMCD = 'GLPFL' (GLP Flag) and not when TSPARMCD = 'GLPTYP'.

message: --DTC is after the latest Disposition date
description: Date/Time of Observation (--DTC) for an animal's live-phase findings should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

message: Missing value for --SPEC, when --TESTCD equals 'GROSPATH'

message: --SPEC variable is populated, when --TESTCD equals 'CLSFUP'

Other relevant components of the Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) finding must be parsed into one or more Qualifier variables and the Supplemental Qualifier --RESMOD.

message: Missing TP dataset

message: Missing SJ dataset

message: RSTAGE value is populated, when RSTGCD = 'UNPLAN'
description: Description of Repro Stage (RSTAGE) should be NULL, when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Repro Stage, where Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) is equal to 'UNPLAN'.

message: Missing value for SJUPDES, when RSTGCD='UNPLAN'
description: Description of Repro Stage (SJUPDES) should be populated, when a subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Repro Stage, where Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) is equal to 'UNPLAN'.

message: Invalid value for RSTGCD
description: The value of Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) should be no more than 8 characters in length.

message: Missing values for TTENRL and TTDUR
description: At least one of Rule for End of Repro Stage (TTENRL) or Planned Duration of Repro Stage (TTDUR) should be populated.

message: Non-unique value for RSTAGE within RSTGCD
description: Description of Repro Stage (RSTAGE) must have a unique value for a given value of Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) within the domain.

message: Non-unique value for RSTGCD within RSTAGE
description: Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) must have a unique value for a given value of Description of Repro Stage (RSTAGE) within the domain.

message: The combination of RSTAGE, TTSTRL TTENRL, and TTDUR is not unique for each RSTGCD
description: The combination of Description of Repro Stage (RSTAGE), Rule for Start of Repro Stage (TTSTRL), Rule for End of Repro Stage (TTENRL), and Planned Duration of Repro Stage (TTDUR) should be unique for each Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD).

message: Invalid value for TPSTGORD
description: Order of Repro Stage within Repro Path (TPSTGORD) variable value must be an integer.

message: Invalid RSTGCD
description: Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) values should match entries in the Trial Repro Stages (TT) dataset, except for an unplanned Repro Stage (RSTGCD = 'UNPLAN').

message: Invalid RSTGCD/RSTAGE
description: The combination of Repro Stage Code (RSTGCD) and Description of Repro Stage (RSTAGE) values should match entries in the Trial Repro Stages (TT) dataset, except for an unplanned Repro Stage (RSTGCD = 'UNPLAN').

message: Invalid value for RPRFDY
description: Repro Phase Start Reference Day (RPRFDY) must be 0 or 1 in the Trial Repro Paths (TP) dataset.

message: Invalid value for RPATHCD
description: The value of Planned Repro Path Code (RPATHCD) should be no more than 20 characters in length.

message: Invalid RPATHCD
description: Repro Path Code (RPATHCD) values should match entries in the Trial Repro Paths (TP) dataset.

message: Non-unique value for TPSTGORD within RPATHCD
description: Order of Repro Stage within Repro Path (TPSTGORD) must have a unique value for a given value of Planned Repro Path Code (RPATHCD) within the Trial Repro Paths (TP) dataset.

message: Missing value for RPHASE when Repro Phase Day values are provided
description: Repro Phase (RPHASE) is required to be populated when any Repro Phase timing variable is populated: Planned Repro Phase Day of Observation (RPPLDY), Planned Repro Phase Day of Obs Start (RPPLSTDY), Planned Repro Phase Day of Obs End (RPPLENDY), Actual Repro Phase Day of Observation (--RPDY), Actual Repro Phase Day of Obs Start (--RPSTDY), Actual Repro Phase Day of Obs End (--RPENDY)

message: --DTC is before the latest Disposition date
description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) variable value must be greater than or equal to Start Date/Time of latest Disposition (DSSTDTC) for post-mortem Findings domains: Death Diagnosis and Details (DD), Macroscopic Findings (MA), Microscopic Findings (MI), Organ Measurements (OM), Tumor Findings (TF).

message: Negative value for --STRESN when --EXCLFL is not populated
description: The value of Standardized Result in Numeric Format (--STRESN) cannot be less than 0 when the record is not excluded from analysis, i.e., Exclude from Statistics (--EXCLFL) is not 'Y'. This applies for the following domains in SEND: BW, FM, FW, LB, OM, PC, PY, RE, VS.
domains: BW, FW, LB, OM, PC, RE, VS

message: Missing STRPSTAT Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Study Report Status' (STRPSTAT) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: No record in DD domain for unscheduled death
description: For subjects that have a disposition status in the Disposition (DS) domain that indicates an unscheduled death, the cause of death should be captured in the Death Diagnosis and Details (DD) domain. Standardized Disposition Term (DSDECOD) values for unscheduled death include: ACCIDENTAL DEATH, FOUND DEAD, MISSING, MORIBUND SACRIFICE, or NON-MORIBUND SACRIFICE. For SEND v3.1 and later, Unscheduled Flag (DSUSCHFL) should also be set to 'Y'.

message: Unscheduled flag is populated for scheduled death
description: For subjects that have a disposition status in the Disposition (DS) domain that indicates a scheduled death, the Unscheduled Flag (DSUSCHFL) should not be populated. Standardized Disposition Term (DSDECOD) values for scheduled death include: INTERIM SACRIFICE, TERMINAL SACRIFICE, RECOVERY SACRIFICE, and REMOVED FROM STUDY ALIVE.

message: --DY value does not equal DSSTDY value
description: For a specimen collected or observed post mortem, the Study Day (--DY) variable value should be the same as the Study Day of Disposition (DSSTDY) variable value in the Disposition (DS) domain.

message: --DY value when BWTESTCD = 'TERMBW' does not equal DSSTDY value
description: For terminal body weight measurements (BWTESTCD/BWTEST = 'TERMBW'/'Terminal Body Weight'), the Study Day Animal Weighed (BWDY) variable value should be the same as the Study Day of Disposition (DSSTDY) variable value in the Disposition (DS) domain.

message: Multiple SDESIGN records
description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for the 'SDESIGN' parameter.

message: Multiple STCAT records
description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for the 'STCAT' parameter.

message: Multiple SSTYP records
description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for the 'SSTYP' parameter.

message: Multiple STDIR records
description: Trial Summary (TS) domain must contain only one record for the 'STDIR' parameter.

message: --DTC does not equal DSSTDTC
description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) variable value must be equal to Start Date/Time of latest Disposition (DSSTDTC) for post-mortem findings in the Macroscopic Findings (MA), Microscopic Findings (MI), and Tumor Findings (TF) domains.

message: Variable length exceeds 200 characters
description: Due to SAS v5 transport file limitations, variables cannot have a length that is greater than 200 characters.  For SEND data, this results in loading errors into regulatory nonclinical review tools. The SENDIG should be followed in how to split long character strings appropriately.

message: Missing value for PCLLOQ when PCSTRESC is 'BLQ' or 'BQL'
description: When a measurement is identified as being below a limit of quantification threshold in Standardized Result in Character Format (PCSTRESC), Lower Limit of Quantitation (PCLLOQ) should be populated.

message: Duplicate value for PCTPTREF for the same USUBJID (or POOLID) when PCNOMDY value is different
description: Time Point Reference (PCTPTREF) must identify a unique dose. Ambiguous references such as 'Most recent dose' should be avoided; it is recommended that Time Point Reference (PCTPTREF) include both the Nominal Study Day for Tabulations (PCNOMDY) and the time point description in order (e.g., <U+201C>Day 1, Dose 1<U+201D> and <U+201C>Day 1, Dose 2<U+201D> for twice daily dosing).

message: PCELTM is not 'PT0H' for pre-dose sampling
description: Specimen concentrations (e.g., plasma) used to calculate a time concentration profile with a pre-dose sample should have Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (PCELTM) populated with 'PT0H'. A negative elapsed time would lead to an incorrect area under the curve.

message: Missing values for required timing variables: --NOMDY, --ELTM, and --TPTREF
description: For PC records contributing to a time concentration profile, PCNOMDY, PCELTM and PCTPTREF must be present and populated. These are the required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for pharmacokinetic concentrations.

message: Duplicate USUBJID within a POOLID
description: There should be only one record per subject (USUBJID) within Pool Identifier (POOLID) in the Pool Definition (POOLDEF) domain.

message: Missing ARMCD Trial Set Parameter within SETCD
description: 'Arm Code' (ARMCD) records should be populated for each SETCD in Trial Sets (TX) domain.

message: Missing SPGRPCD Trial Set Parameter within SETCD
description: 'Sponsor-Defined Group Code' (SPGRPCD) records should be populated for each SETCD in Trial Sets (TX) domain.

message: Missing GRPLBL Trial Set Parameter within SETCD
description: 'Group Label' (GRPLBL) records should be populated for each SETCD in Trial Sets (TX) domain.

message: Missing TRTDOS Trial Set Parameter within SETCD
description: 'Dose Level' (TRTDOS) records should be populated for each SETCD in Trial Sets (TX) domain.

message: Missing TRTDOSU Trial Set Parameter within SETCD
description: 'Dose Units' (TRTDOSU) records should be populated for each SETCD in Trial Sets (TX) domain.

message: Missing values for all required set(s) of timing variables: VISITDY, --STDY, or --NOMDY
description: At least one of these variables or sets of variables must be present and populated in DS: (VISITDY, DSSTDY, or DSNOMDY)  These are the required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for post mortem data.

message: Missing values for all required set(s) of timing variables:  VISITDY, --DY or --NOMDY
description: At least one of the these variables or sets of variables should be populated: VISITDY, --DY, or --NOMDY. These are the Required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated.
domains: BW, CL, CV, EG, LB, PM, RE, VS

message: Missing values for all required timing variables: --DY & --ENDY
description: These variables must be populated:  --DY and --ENDY.  These are the required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for data associated with a time interval.

message: Missing values for required timing variables: (VISITDY and --ELTM) or (--NOMDY and --ELTM)
description: PCNOMDY and PCELTM or VISITDY and PCELTM must be present and populated in PC.   These are the required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for pharmacokinetic concentrations.

message: Value for --STRESC is populated, when --STAT is 'NOT DONE'
description: Status (--STAT) should be NULL, when Standardized Result in Character Format (--STRESC ) is provided.

message: Invalid SETCD
description: Set Code (SETCD) values should match entries in the Trial Sets (TX) dataset.

message: Invalid POOLID
description: Pool ID (POOLID) values should match entries in the Pool Definition (POOLDEF) dataset.
domains: CO, INTERVENTIONS, CL, FW, LB, PC, PP, RELREC, SUPPQUAL

message: No Trial Set with TCNTRL Parameter
description: 'Control Type' (TCNTRL) record should be populated in Trial Sets (TX) domain.   (There must be a record with TXPARMCD = TCNTRL within a set if the study has a control).

message: Duplicate TXPARMCD within a SETCD
description: The value of Parameter Code (TXPARMCD) variable must be unique for each Trial Set (SETCD) within the Trial Sets (TX) domain.

message: Missing values for all required set(s) of timing variables: VISITDY or --NOMDY
description: At least one of these variables or sets of variables must be present and populated in PP: VISITDY or PPNOMDY. These are the required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for pharmacokinetic parameters.

message: No baseline flag record in Domain for subject
description: All subjects should have at least one baseline observation (--BLFL = 'Y') in EG, LB, and VS domains.

message: Invalid --VAL value for SLENGTH
description: TSVAL/TXVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g. P80Y) or null, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='SLENGTH'.

message: Missing SLENGTH Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Study Length' (SLENGTH) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is used for Janus Non Clinical data load blocking.

message: Invalid --VAL value for SPLANSUB
description: TSVAL/TXVAL must be numeric when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD = 'SPLANSUB'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for PLANFSUB
description: TSVAL/TXVAL must be numeric when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD = 'PLANFSUB'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for PLANMSUB
description: TSVAL/TXVAL must be numeric when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD = 'PLANMSUB'.

message: Invalid TSVAL value for STSTDTC
description: TSVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format, when TSPARMCD='STSTDTC'.

message: Invalid TSVAL value for STENDTC
description: TSVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format, when TSPARMCD='STENDTC'.

message: Missing SPLANSUB Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Planned Number of Subjects' (SPLANSUB) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain. It is used for Janus Non Clinical data load blocking.

message: Missing STENDTC Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Study End Date' (STENDTC) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing DOSENDTC Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'End Date/Time of Dose Interval' (DOSENDTC) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing DOSSTDTC Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Start Date/Time of Dose Interval' (DOSSTDTC) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing GLPFL Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Good Laboratory Practice Flag' (GLPFL) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing PCLASS Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Pharmacologic Class' (PCLASS) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing PDOSFRQ Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Planned Dose Frequency' (PDOSFRQ) record should be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing SEXPOP Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Sex of Participants' (SEXPOP) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing TRTUNII Trial Summary Parameter
description: 'Primary Treatment Unique Ingredient ID' (TRTUNII) record must be populated in Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Invalid --VAL value for DOSENDTC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='DOSENDTC'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for DOSSTDTC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='DOSSTDTC'.

message: Invalid TSVAL value for SNDIGVER
description: TSVAL for SNDIGVER record must be a valid term from (SNDIGVER) CT codelist.

message: Invalid --VAL value for EXPSTDTC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD = 'EXPSTDTC'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for EXPENDTC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL variable value must be in ISO 8601 format, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD = 'EXPENDTC'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for DOSDUR
description: TSVAL/TXVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g. P80Y) or null, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='DOSDUR'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for INTSAC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g. P80Y) or null, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='INTSAC'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for TRMSAC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g. P80Y) or null, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='TRMSAC'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for RECSAC
description: TSVAL/TXVAL value must be either ISO 8601 format for time period (e.g. P80Y) or null, when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD='RECSAC'.

message: Invalid --VAL value for AGE
description: TSVAL/TXVAL must be numeric when TSPARMCD/TXPARMCD = 'AGE'.

message: SETCD value not present in DM
description: Set Code (SETCD) values defined in Trial Sets (TX) should be assigned to at least one subject (USUBJID) in Demographics (DM).

message: Non-unique value for TXSEQ variable within TX domain
description: Sequence Number (TXSEQ) should be unique within the entire Trial Sets (TX) dataset because there is no Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variable.

message: Invalid value for --DTHREL
description: Relationship to Death (--DTHREL) describes the relationship of a particular finding to the death of a subject. Allowed values for this variable include: 'Y' (Caused death), 'N' (Did not cause death), or 'U' (Unknown).

message: Missing value for --STRESU, when --LLOQ is provided
description: Lower Limit of Quantitation (--LLOQ) should be presented using the same units as those presented in Standard Units (--STRESU). When --LLOQ is provided, --STRESU should also be populated.

message: SEENDTC is after the latest Disposition date
description: End Date/Time of Element (SEENDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

message: EXLOT is populated, when EXDOSE equals 0 or is NULL
description: If Name of Actual Treatment (EXTRT) is not administered, (i.e., Dose per Administration (EXDOSE) is equal to zero or is not provided), then Lot Number  (EXLOT) should be null.

message: EXLOT is null, when EXDOSE is provided
description: If Name of Actual Treatment (EXTRT) is administered, (i.e., Dose per Administration (EXDOSE) is greater than zero), then Lot Number (EXLOT) should also be provided.

message: Missing value for --EXCLFL, when --REASEX is provided
description: Exclude from Statistics (--EXCLFL) should be set to 'Y', when Reason for Exclusion from Statistics (--REASEX) is populated.

message: Invalid --VAL value for ENVTEMPU
description: --VAL for ENVTEMPU record is the unit for the environmental temperature.  Only values of 'C' or 'F' are acceptable.

message: Variable value not found in non-extensible codelist
description: Variable must be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist. New terms cannot be added into non-extensible codelists.
notes:
Violation of CT2001 for the following variable/codelist pairs will be considered part of Rejection criteria. All others will be
considered Errors.

<Variable Name (Codelist Name)>

COUNTRY (COUNTRY)

RELTYPE (RELTYPE)
