--FAST (NY)
--OCCUR (NY)
--PRESP (NY)
AESER (NY)
AESCONG (NY)
AESDISAB (NY)
AESDTH (NY)
AESHOSP (NY)
AESLIFE (NY)
AECONTRT (NY)
AESCAN (NY)
AESMIE (NY)
AESOD (NY)
IEORRES (NY)
IESTRESC (NY)
--STAT (ND)

message: Variable value not found in extensible codelist
description: Variable should be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist. New terms can be added as long as they are not duplicates, synonyms or subsets of existing standard terms.

message: Coded and Decoded values do not have the same Code in CDISC CT
description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Codelist Code value in CDISC control terminology. There is one-to-one relationship between paired variable values defined in CDISC control terminology by Codelist Code value.

message: Variable value not found in non-extensible codelist when value-level condition occurs
description: Variable must be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist when its value level condition is met. New terms cannot be added into non-extensible codelists.
notes:
Violation of CT2004 for the following variable/codelist pairs will be considered part of Rejection criteria. All others will be
considered Errors.

<Variable Name (Codelist Name)>
TSVAL when TSPARMCD value is SEXPOP (SEXPOP)
TSVAL when TSPARMCD value is ADDON (NY)
TSVAL when TSPARMCD value is RANDOM (NY)

message: Variable value not found in extensible codelist when value-level condition occurs
description: Variable should be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist when its value level condition is met. New terms can be added as long as they are not duplicates, synonyms or subsets of existing standard terms.

message: Coded and Decoded values do not have the same Code in CDISC CT when value-level condition occurs
description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Codelist Code value in CDISC control terminology. There is one-to-one relationship between paired variable values defined in CDISC control terminology by Codelist Code value within the same value level condition.

message: No records in data source
description: Domain table should have at least one record.

message: Null value in variable marked as Required
description: Required variables (where Core attribute is 'Req') cannot be null for any records.
notes:
Violation of SD0002 will be considered part of Rejection criteria, except for the following variables in DM domain that will be considered Errors.

<Variable Name>
ARMCD
ARM
ACTARMCD
ACTARM

message: Invalid ISO 8601 value for variable
description: Value of Dates/Time variables (*DTC) must conform to the ISO 8601 international standard.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Inconsistent value for DOMAIN
description: Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN) variable should be consistent with the name of the dataset.

message: Duplicate value for --SEQ variable
description: The value of Sequence Number (--SEQ) variable must be unique for each record within a domain and within each Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) or Pool Identifier (POOLID) variables value when they are present in the domain. Exclusions are DE, DO, DT, DU, and DX domains.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-DM), INTERVENTIONS (-DX), FINDINGS (-DO, -DU), EVENTS (-DE, -DT), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: No baseline flag record in Domain for subject
description: All subjects should have at least one baseline observation (--BLFL = 'Y') in EG, LB, MB, MS, PC and VS domains, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN') or were not treated (ACTARMCD = 'NOTTRT').
domains: EG, LB, MB, MS, PC, VS

message: Inconsistent value for Standard Units
description: Standard Units (--STRESU) must be consistent for all records with the same Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD), Object of the Observation (--OBJ), Measurement Test, or Examination Detail (--TSTDTL), Category (--CAT), Specimen Type (--SPEC), Method of Test or Examination (--METHOD), and Marker String (--MRKSTR).

message: Value for --DECOD not found in MedDRA dictionary
description: Value for the Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) variable must be populated using a Preferred Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-insensitive).

message: Value for --DECOD is in incorrect case
description: Case for the Dictionary-Derived Term (--DECOD) variable must be sentence case using a Preferred Term of the MedDRA dictionary of a version specified in the define.xml (Case-sensitive).

message: No qualifiers set to 'Y' when AE is Serious
description: When Serious Event (AESER) variable value is 'Y', then at least one of seriousness criteria variables is expected to have value 'Y' (Involves Cancer (AESCAN), Congenital Anomaly or Birth Defect (AESCONG), Persist or Signif Disability/Incapacity (AESDISAB), Results in Death (AESDTH), Requires or Prolongs Hospitalization (AESHOSP), Is Life Threatening (AESLIFE), or Other Medically Important Serious Event (AESMIE)).

message: ARM is not 'Screen Failure' when ARMCD equals 'SCRNFAIL', or vice versa
description: Description of Arm (ARM) must equal 'Screen Failure' when Arm Code (ARMCD) is 'SCRNFAIL', and vice versa.

message: --STDY is after --ENDY
description: Study Day of Start of Event, Exposure or Observation (--STDY) must be less or equal to Study Day of End of Event, Exposure or Observation (--ENDY).

message: --STDTC is after --ENDTC
description: Start Date/Time of Event, Exposure or Observation (--STDTC) must be less or equal to End Date/Time of Event, Exposure or Observation (--ENDTC).

message: Negative value for --DOSE
description: Non-missing Dose (--DOSE) value must be greater than or equal to 0.

message: Negative value for --DUR
description: Non-missing Duration of Event, Exposure or Observation (--DUR) value must be greater than or equal to 0.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TE

message: Missing value for --STRESC when --DRVFL='Y'
description: Character Result/Finding in Std Format (--STRESC) value should not be null when Derived Flag (--DRVFL) value is 'Y'.

message: Invalid value for --TEST variable
description: The value of Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST) should be no more than 40 characters in length.

message: Invalid value for --TESTCD variable
description: The value of a Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD) variable should be limited to 8 characters, cannot start with a number, and cannot contain characters other than letters in upper case, numbers, or underscores.

message: Invalid value for --PARM variable
description: The value of Parameter (--PARM) variable should be no more than 40 characters in length.

message: Invalid value for --PARMCD variable
description: The value of Parameter Short Name (--PARMCD) variables should be no more than 8 characters in length.

message: Missing End Time-Point value
description: One End Time-Point variable is expected to be populated when an event or an intervention occurred. (E.g., End Date/Time of Event or Intervention (--ENDTC), or End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF), or End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRTPT) should not be missing, or Occurrence (--OCCUR) = 'N' or Completion Status (--STAT) != '') or Duration (--DUR) != '').

message: Missing Start Time-Point value
description: One Start Time-Point variable is expected to be populated when an event or intervention occurred. (E.g., Start Date/Time of Event or Intervention (--STDTC), or Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF), or Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRTPT) should not be missing, or Occurrence (--OCCUR) = 'N' or Completion Status (--STAT) != '').

message: Missing value for --STAT when --REASND is provided
description: Completion Status (--STAT) should be set to 'NOT DONE' when Reason Not Done (--REASND) is populated.

message: Missing value for --DTC when --ENDTC is provided
description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) should not be null when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) is not null.

message: --DTC is after --ENDTC
description: Date/Time of Specimen Collection (--DTC) must be less or equal to End Date/Time of Specimen Collection (--ENDTC).

message: Missing value for --ORRESU when --ORRES is provided
description: Original Units (--ORRESU) should not be null when Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) is provided is a numeric result.

message: Missing value for --ORRES when --ORRESU is provided
description: Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) should not be null when Original Units (--ORRESU) is provided.

message: Value for --STNRHI is less than value for --STNRLO
description: Reference Range Upper Limit-Std Units (--STNRHI) value must be greater than or equal to Reference Range Lower Limit-Std Units (--STNRLO) value.

message: Missing value for --STRESU when --STRESC is provided
description: Standard Units (--STRESU) should not be null when Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) is provided as a numeric result.

message: Missing value for --STRESC when --STRESU is provided
description: Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) should not be null when Standard Units (--STRESU) is provided.

message: Missing values for --STDTC, --STRF and --STRTPT when --ENDTC, --ENRF or --ENRTPT is provided
description: Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC), Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF) or Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) should not be null when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC), End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF) or End Relative to Reference Time Period (--ENRTPT) is not null.

message: Missing value for --TPT when --TPTNUM is provided
description: Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) should not be null when Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) is populated.
domains: CO, INTERVENTIONS (-DX), FINDINGS, EVENTS (-DS), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing value for --TPTNUM when --TPT is provided
description: Planned Time Point Number (--TPTNUM) should not be null when Planned Time Point Name (--TPT) is populated.
domains: CO, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS (-DS), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing value for --TPTREF when --ELTM is provided
description: Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) should not be null when Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) is populated.
domains: CO, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS (-DS), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing value for --DOSU when --DOSE, --DOSTXT or --DOSTOT is provided
description: Dose Units (--DOSU) must be populated when Dose per Administration (--DOSE), Dose Description (--DOSTXT) or Total Daily Dose (--DOSTOT) is provided.

message: Missing value for --STRESC when --ORRES is provided
description: Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) must be populated when Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) is provided.

message: Value for variable not found in user-defined codelist
description: Variable values should be populated with terms found in the user-defined codelist associated with the variable in define.xml.

message: Value of Study Day variable equals 0
description: Study Day variables (*DY) value should not equal 0.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Inconsistent value for --TEST within --TESTCD
description: All values of Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST) should be the same for a given value of Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD).

message: Value for --OCCUR is populated for unsolicited Intervention or Event
description: Occurrence (--OCCUR) may only be populated when a given Intervention or Event has been pre-specified (--PRESP = 'Y').

message: --STAT does not equal 'NOT DONE' when --PRESP='Y' and --OCCUR is null
description: When no response is provided for Occurrence (--OCCUR) for a pre-specified Intervention or Event (--PRESP = 'Y'), then Status (--STAT) should be set to 'NOT DONE'.

message: Missing value for --TRTV when --VAMT is not null
description: Treatment Vehicle (--TRTV) should be provided when Treatment Vehicle Amount (--VAMT) is specified.

message: Missing value for --VAMTU when --VAMT is populated
description: Treatment Vehicle Amount Units (--VAMTU) should not be null when Treatment Vehicle Amount (--VAMT) is populated.

message: Missing value for --STRESC when --RESCAT is populated
description: Character Result/Finding in Std Units (--STRESC) should be provided when Result Category (--RESCAT) is specified.

message: Inconsistent value for QLABEL within QNAM
description: All values of Qualifier Variable Label (QLABEL) should be the same for a given value of Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM).

message: Missing value for --ORRES when --STAT or --DRVFL is not populated
description: Status (--STAT) should be set to 'NOT DONE' or Derived Flag (--DRVFL) should have a value of 'Y' when Result or Finding in Original Units (--ORRES) is null.

message: Missing value for --STTPT when --STRTPT is populated
description: Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) must not be null when Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) is provided.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing value for --ENTPT when --ENRTPT is populated
description: End Reference Time Point (--ENTPT) must not be null when End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) is provided.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Inconsistent value for VISIT within VISITNUM
description: All values of Visit Name (VISIT) should be the same for a given value of Visit Number (VISITNUM).
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TV

message: Inconsistent value for VISITNUM within VISIT
description: All values of Visit Number (VISITNUM) should be the same for a given value of Visit Name (VISIT).
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TV

message: ARM is not 'Not Assigned' when ARMCD equals 'NOTASSGN', or vice versa
description: Description of Arm (ARM) must equal 'Not Assigned' when Arm Code (ARMCD) is 'NOTASSGN', and vice versa.

message: Variable in define.xml is not present in the dataset
description: Variables listed in the data definition document (define.xml) should be included in the dataset.

message: SDTM/dataset variable type mismatch
description: Variable Data Types in the dataset should match the variable data types described in SDTM.

message: SDTM Required variable not found
description: Variables described in SDTM IG as Required must be included in the dataset.

message: SDTM Expected variable not found
description: Variables described in SDTM IG as Expected should be included in the dataset.

message: Variable appears in dataset, but is not in SDTM model
description: Only variables listed in SDTM model should appear in a dataset. New sponsor defined variables must not be added, and existing variables must not be renamed or modified.

message: Define.xml/dataset variable type mismatch
description: Variable DataType in define.xml must match variable Type in dataset. Define-XML data types of 'integer' and 'float' match dataset type of 'Num', all other match 'Char'.

message: Variable in dataset is not present in define.xml
description: Variables included in the dataset must be described in the data definition document (define.xml).

message: Domain referenced in define.xml, but dataset is missing
description: Domains referenced in data definition document (define.xml) should be included in the submission.

message: Incompatible data source
description: Domain table must have a valid format (e.g., SAS transport (XPORT) v.5 or text-delimited).

message: SDTM/dataset variable label mismatch
description: Variable Label in the dataset should match the variable label described in SDTM IG. When creating a new domain Variable Labels could be adjusted as appropriate to properly convey the meaning in the context of the data being submitted.

message: SDTM/dataset variable label mismatch
description: Variable Label in the dataset should match the variable label described in SDTM IG. When creating a new domain Variable Labels could be adjusted as appropriate to properly convey the meaning in the context of the data being submitted.

message: Subject is not present in DM domain
description: All Subjects (USUBJID) must be present in Demographics (DM) domain.

message: USUBJID/VISIT/VISITNUM values do not match SV domain data
description: All Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) + Visit Name (VISIT) + Visit Number (VISITNUM) combination values in data should be present in the Subject Visits (SV) domain. There is an exception for records, where Status (--STAT) variable value is populated. E.g., --STAT = 'NOT DONE'. Another exception is for records, where Occurrence (ECOCCUR) is 'N' in EC domain.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-SV), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Invalid ARMCD
description: Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN').

message: Invalid ETCD
description: Element Code (ETCD) values should match entries in the Trial Elements (TE) dataset, except for unplanned Element (ETCD = 'UNPLAN').

message: IETESTCD value doesn't exist in TI domain
description: A value for Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD) must be present the Trial Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria (TI) domain.

message: No Disposition record found for subject
description: All Demographics (DM) subjects (USUBJID) should have at least one record in the Disposition (DS) domain. The only possible exceptions for SDTMIG v3.2 (and earlier) are Screen Failures (ARMCD=SCRNFAIL) and Not Assigned Treatment (ARMCD=NOTASSGN) subjects, or subjects with ARMCD=null. If the study is ongoing, Parameter Value (TSVAL) for the 'ONGOSIND/Ongoing Study Indicator' parameter should be set to 'Y' in the Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: No Exposure record found for subject
description: All Demographics (DM) subjects (USUBJID) participating in a study that includes investigational product should have at least one record in the Exposure (EX) domain, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL'), were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN') or did not receive study treatment (ACTARMCD = 'NOTTRT').

message: Invalid ARM/ARMCD
description: The combination of Description of Planned Arm (ARM) and Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) values must match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset, except for subjects who failed screening (ARMCD = 'SCRNFAIL') or were not fully assigned to an Arm (ARMCD = 'NOTASSGN').

message: Invalid RDOMAIN
description: Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) must have a valid value of Domains included in the study data.

message: Invalid IDVAR
description: Identifying Variable (IDVAR) must have a valid value of variables from a referenced Domain.

message: Invalid referenced record
description: Reference record defined by Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN), Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR) and Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) must exist in the target Domain.

message: EX record is present when subject is not assigned to an arm
description: Subjects that are not assigned to an Arm (ARMCD='NOTASSGN') or are screen failures (ARMCD='SCRNFAIL'), or ARM=null, should not have any Exposure records. Run-in records (EPOCH='RUN-IN') are excluded from firing for this validation rule.

message: AE start date is after the latest Disposition date
description: Start Date/Time of Adverse Event (AESTDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC). Investigator should provide a date of study discontinuation for each subject in Disposition (DS) domain. If the study is ongoing, Parameter Value (TSVAL) for the 'ONGOSIND/Ongoing Study Indicator' parameter should be set to 'Y' in the Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Exposure end date is after the latest Disposition date
description: End Date/Time of Treatment (EXENDTC) should be less than or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC). Investigator should provide a date of study discontinuation for each subject in Disposition (DS) domain. If the study is ongoing, Parameter Value (TSVAL) for the 'ONGOSIND/Ongoing Study Indicator' parameter should be set to 'Y' in the Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Duplicate USUBJID in DM within STUDYID
description: The value of Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variable must be unique for each subject across all trials in the submission. In the Demographics (DM) domain, there should only be one record per subject.

message: Negative or zero value for AGE
description: The value of Age (AGE) cannot be less than or equal to 0.

message: Mismatch between IEORRES and IESTRESC values
description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) and I/E Criterion Result in Std Format (IESTRESC) should have the same value.

message: SUPPQUAL duplicate records
description: All SUPPQUAL Domains records are associated with a single parent record and must have a unique combination of Study Identifier (STUDYID), Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID), Identifying Variable (IDVAR), Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) and Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM) variable value. For all SUPPQUAL domain record all The QNAM variable should be unique for each parent record.

message: RFSTDTC is not provided for a randomized subject
description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) should be populated for all randomized subjects, those where Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) is not equal to 'SCRNFAIL' or 'NOTASSGN' or null.

message: RFENDTC is not provided for a randomized subject
description: Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC) should be populated for all randomized subjects, those where Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) is not equal to 'SCRNFAIL' or 'NOTASSGN' or null. If the study is ongoing, Parameter Value (TSVAL) for the 'ONGOSIND/Ongoing Study Indicator' parameter should be set to 'Y' in the Trial Summary (TS) domain.

message: Missing values for TEENRL and TEDUR
description: At least one of Rule for End of Element (TEENRL) or Planned Duration of Element (TEDUR) should be populated.

message: AESDTH is not 'Y' when AEOUT='FATAL'
description: Results in Death (AESDTH) should equal 'Y' when Outcome of Adverse Event (AEOUT) is 'FATAL'.

message: AEOUT is not 'FATAL' when AESDTH='Y'
description: Outcome of Adverse Event should equal 'FATAL' when Results in Death (AESDTH) is 'Y'.

message: Missing value for SEUPDES when ETCD='UNPLAN'
description: Description of Unplanned Element (SEUPDES) should be populated when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Element, where Element Code (ETCD) is equal to 'UNPLAN'.

message: Missing value for AGEU when AGE is provided
description: Age Units (AGEU) should be provided when Age (AGE) is populated.

message: Invalid usage of SUPPQUAL for non-general-observation-class Domain
description: Supplemental Qualifiers special purpose dataset (SUPP--) can only be used to capture non-standard variables and their association to parent records in general-observation-class datasets (Events, Findings, Interventions) and Demographics. Another exception is Subject Visits domain in SDTM-IG prior v3.4.

message: SUBJID is not unique for each subject within study
description: The value of Subject Identifier for the Study (SUBJID) variable must be unique for each subject within the study.

message: RFSTDTC is after RFENDTC
description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) must be less than or equal to Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC).

message: Missing value for AGE when AGEU is provided
description: Age (AGE) should be provided when Age Units (AGEU) are populated.

message: Invalid value for ARMCD exceeding 20 characters
description: The value of Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) should be no more than 20 characters in length.

message: Invalid STUDYID
description: Study Identifier (STUDYID) values must match the STUDYID in Demographics (DM) domain.

message: CODTC is populated when comment is a child record of another domain
description: The value of Date/Time of Comment (CODTC) should be null when comments are related to a specific parent record or group of parent records in a domain (RDOMAIN, IDVAR and IDVARVAL are populated).

message: Invalid value for ETCD
description: The value of Element Code (ETCD) should be no more than 8 characters in length.

message: ELEMENT value is populated when ETCD= 'UNPLAN'
description: Description of Element (ELEMENT) should be null when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Element, where Element Code (ETCD) is equal to 'UNPLAN'.

message: Invalid ISO 8601 value for variable
description: Value of Duration, Elapsed Time, and Interval variables (--DUR, --ELTM, --EVLINT, --STINT, --ENINT, TDSTOFF, TDTGTPAI, TDMINPAI, TDMAXPAI) must conform to the ISO 8601 international standard.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TRIAL DESIGN (-TA, -TI, -TS, -TV)

message: Invalid ETCD/ELEMENT
description: The combination of Element Code (ETCD) and Description of Element (ELEMENT) values should match entries in the Trial Elements (TE) dataset, except for unplanned Element (ETCD = 'UNPLAN').

message: TAETORD is populated, ETCD = 'UNPLAN'
description: Planned Order of Elements within Arm (TAETORD) should be null when subject's experience for a particular period of time is represented as an unplanned Element (ETCD = 'UNPLAN').

message: Invalid TAETORD
description: Order of Element within Arm (TAETORD) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: EPOCH is not in TA.EPOCH
description: Epoch (EPOCH) values should match entries in the Trial Arms (TA) dataset.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-SC), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: IETESTCD/IETEST/IECAT values do not exist in TI domain
description: The combination of Inclusion/Exclusion Criterion Short Name (IETESTCD), Criterion (IETEST), and Category (IECAT) values should match entries in the Trial Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria (TI) dataset.

message: VISITNUM value does not match TV domain data
description: Visit Number (VISITNUM) values should match entries in the Trial Visits (TV) dataset when they are planned visits (SVUPDES = null).

message: VISITNUM/VISIT/VISITDY values do not match TV domain data
description: The combination of Visit Number (VISITNUM), Visit Name (VISIT), and Planned Study Day of Visit (VISITDY) values should match entries in the Trial Visits (TV) dataset when they are planned visits (SVUPDES = null).

message: VISITDY is populated for unplanned visit
description: Planned Study Day of Visit (VISITDY) should equal null for unplanned visits, where Description of Unplanned Visit (SVUPDES) is populated.

message: Missing DM dataset
description: Demographics (DM) dataset must be included in every submission.

message: Unexpected character value in variable
description: Character values should not have leading space ' ' characters, carriage returns, or '.' as an entire value. The only exceptions are COVALn and TSVALn variables.

message: Invalid value for QNAM variable
description: The value of Qualifier Variable Name (QNAM) should be limited to 8 characters, cannot start with a number, and cannot contain characters other than letters in upper case, numbers, or underscores.

message: VISIT/VISITNUM values do not match TV domain data
description: Combination of Visit Name (VISIT) and Visit Number (VISITNUM) in subject-level domains should match that in the TV domain except for Unscheduled and Unplanned visits.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Invalid value for RELTYPE variable
description: Relationship Type (RELTYPE) must be null when Identifying Variable (IDVAR) is populated with a --SEQ value.

message: Non-unique value for ELEMENT within ETCD
description: Description of Element (ELEMENT) must have a unique value for a given value of Element Code (ETCD) within the domain.

message: Non-ASCII or non-printable characters in variable
description: Variables value must not include non-ASCII or non-printable characters (outside of 32-126 ASCII code range), limited to variables which values may be converted into new variable name or label (--TEST, --TESTCD, --PARM, --PARMCD, QLABEL, QNAM).
domains: FINDINGS, FINDINGS ABOUT, SUPPQUAL, TI, TS, STUDY REFERENCE

message: Value for --STRF is populated when RFSTDTC is null
description: Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF) should not be populated for subjects with missing value for Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Value for --ENRF is populated when RFENDTC is null
description: End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF) should not be populated for subjects with missing value for Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC).
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: No records for 'SCRNFAIL' subject are found in IE domain
description: All subjects with Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) equals 'SCRNFAIL' should have records in the Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met (IE) domain.

message: Inconsistent value for ARM
description: A value for Description of Planned Arm (ARM) must have a unique value for Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) with the domain.

message: Inconsistent value for ARMCD
description: A value for Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) must have a unique value for Description of Planned Arm (ARM) with the domain.

message: Missing value for DSCAT
description: Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) should be populated.

message: Missing value for --TOXGR when --TOX is populated
description: Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR) should be provided when Toxicity (--TOX) is populated.
domains: CP, CV, EG, LB, MI, PC, PP, RE, VS, AE, CE, MH

message: Missing value for --TOX when --TOXGR is populated
description: A value for a Toxicity (--TOX) variable should be provided when a Toxicity Grade (--TOXGR) variable value is populated and greater than 0.
domains: CP, CV, EG, LB, MI, MO, PC, PP, RE, VS

message: Non-unique value for TSSEQ variable within TSPARMCD
description: Sequence Number (TSSEQ) must have a unique value for a given value of Trial Summary Parameter Short Name (TSPARMCD) within the domain.

message: --CAT value is redundant with other variable values
description: Value of Category (--CAT) should not be identical to that in Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN); Reported Term (--TERM); Name of Measurement, Test, or Examination (--TESTCD); Name of Treatment (--TRT); Standardized Coded Term (--DECOD); Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS).
domains: INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TI

message: --SCAT value is redundant with other variable values
description: Value of Subcategory (--SCAT) should not be identical to that in Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN); Reported Term (--TERM); Name of Measurement, Test, or Examination (--TESTCD); Name of Treatment (--TRT); Standardized Coded Term (--DECOD); Body System or Organ Class (--BODSYS).
domains: INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TI

message: Values for --CAT and --SCAT are identical
description: Values of Category (--CAT) and Subcategory (--SCAT) variables should not be identical.
domains: INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TI

message: Time point for non-occurred event or intervention is provided
description: Value of Start Relative to Reference Period (--STRF) or End Relative to Reference Period (--ENRF) should not be populated when an event or intervention is marked as not occurred (--OCCUR='N').

message: Inconsistent value for --TESTCD within --TEST
description: All values of Short Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TESTCD) should be the same for a given value of Name of Measurement, Test or Examination (--TEST).

message: No --BLFL variable in custom Findings domain
description: Baseline Flag (--BLFL) should be present in all custom Findings domains.

message: IESTRESC is not 'Y' when IECAT ='EXCLUSION'
description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) must equal 'Y' when Inclusion/Exclusion Category (IECAT) is 'EXCLUSION'.

message: IESTRESC is not 'N' when IECAT ='INCLUSION'
description: I/E Criterion Original Result (IEORRES) must equal 'N' when Inclusion/Exclusion Category (IECAT) is 'INCLUSION'.

message: Both --DOSE and --DOSTXT values are populated
description: Only one of Dose (--DOSE) or Dose Description (--DOSTXT) variables must be populated on the same record.

message: Invalid value for QLABEL
description: Qualifier Variable Label (QLABEL) value may have up to 40 characters.

message: Non-unique value for ETCD within ELEMENT
description: Element Code (ETCD) must have a unique value for a given value of Description of Element (ELEMENT) within the domain.

message: Unexpected value for IDVAR/IDVARVAL
description: Both Identifying Variable (IDVAR) and Identifying Variable Value (IDVARVAL) should not be populated when relating information to the Demographics (DM) domain.

message: Non-unique value for TAETORD within ARMCD
description: Order of Element within Arm (TAETORD) must have a unique value for a given value of Planned Arm Code (ARMCD) within the domain.

message: Unexpected value for ARMCD variable
description: Records for subjects who failed a screening or were not assigned to study treatment (ARMCD is 'SCRNFAIL' or 'NOTASSGN') should not be included in the Trial Arms (TA) or Trial Visits (TV) datasets.

message: Duplicate VISITNUM
description: The value of Visit Number (VISITNUM) variable should be unique for each record within a subject.

message: Missing MB dataset when MS dataset is present
description: Microbiology Specimen (MB) dataset should be included when a Microbiology Susceptibility Test (MS) dataset is present.

message: AESER is not 'Y' when AESOD equals 'Y'
description: Serious Event (AESER) variable value is expected to be 'Y' when Occurred with Overdose (AESOD) variable value equals 'Y'.

message: Dataset is not present in define.xml
description: Datasets included in study data must be described in the data definition document (define.xml).

message: Duplicate ETCD value
description: The value of Element Code (ETCD) variable must be unique within Trial Elements (TE) domain.

message: Missing RDOMAIN value when IDVAR is populated
description: Value of Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) variable must be populated when value of Identifying Variable (IDVAR) variable is populated.

message: IDVARVAL value is populated when RELTYPE values is populated
description: Variable Value (IDVARVAL) variable value should not be populated when Relationship Type (RELTYPE) variable value is populated.

message: USUBJID value is populated when RELTYPE values is populated
description: Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variable value should not be populated when Relationship Type (RELTYPE) variable value is populated.

message: Duplicate ELEMENT value
description: The value of Element (Description of Element) variable must be unique within Trial Elements (TE) domain.

message: Inconsistent value for --PARM within --PARMCD
description: All values of a Parameter (--PARM) variables should be the same for a given value of a Parameter Short Name (--PARMCD) variables.

message: Inconsistent value for --PARMCD within --PARM
description: All values of a Parameter Short Name (--PARMCD) variables should be the same for a given value of a Parameter (--PARM) variables.

message: Missing IDVAR value when RDOMAIN value is provided
description: Value of Identifying Variable (IDVAR) variable must be populated when Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) variable value is provided, with the only exception of 'DM' value for RDOMAIN.

message: Variable prohibited for use in SDTM
description: Variables described in IG as inappropriate for usage must be not included in the dataset.

message: Variable which can be used only in SEND
description: Variables designed only for SEND pre-clinical studies must be not included in the SDTM dataset.

message: Variable not recommended for use
description: Variables described in IG as not recommended for usage should be not included in the dataset.

message: Model Permissible variable added into standard domain
description: SDTM model variable may be added into standard domains according to its domain general class, if there are no restrictions on their usage specified in IG.

message: Regulatory Expected variable not found
description: Variables requested by the relevant regulatory agency in policy documents should be included in the dataset. E.g., EPOCH.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM, -SV), INTERVENTIONS (-DX, -SU), FINDINGS (-DO, -DU, -SC), EVENTS (-DE, -DT, -MH), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Permissible variable with missing value for all records
description: Permissible variable should not be present in domain, when the variable has missing value for all records in the dataset (SDTM-IG 3.1.1 - 3.2). Permissible variable should not be present in domain, when the variable is not present on study CRFs (SDTM-IG 3.3 and higher).

message: Variable is in wrong order within domain
description: The order of variables should reflect the order of the variables in the SDTM Model. Variables for the three general observation classes must be ordered with Identifiers first, followed by the Topic, Qualifier, and Timing variables. Within each role, variables must be ordered as shown in SDTM: Tables 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4, and 2.2.5.

message: Variable length is too long for actual data
description: Variable length should be assigned based on actual stored data to minimize file size. Datasets should be re-sized to the maximum length of actual data used prior to splitting.

message: Missing --DY variable when --DTC variable is present
description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable should be included into dataset when Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: --DY variable value is not populated
description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable value should be populated when Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: --DY variable value is imputed
description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable value should not be imputed. It may be only populated when both Collection Study Date/Time (--DTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided and both include complete date part.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Incorrect value for --DY variable
description: Collection Study Day (--DY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --DY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) +1 if --DTC is on or after RFSTDTC; --DY = (date portion of --DTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) if --DTC precedes RFSTDTC.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUTT

message: Missing --STDY variable when --STDTC variable is present
description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable should be included into dataset when Start Study Date/Time (--STDTC) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS (-SU), FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS (-MH), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: --STDY variable value is not populated
description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable value should be populated when Start Study Date (--STDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: --STDY variable value is imputed
description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may be only populated when both Start Study Date/Time (--STDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Incorrect value for --STDY variable
description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --STDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) +1 if --STDTC is on or after RFSTDTC; --STDY = (date portion of --STDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) if --STDTC precedes RFSTDTC.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing --ENDY variable when --ENDTC variable is present
description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable should be included into dataset when End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS (-SU), FINDINGS (-DO), EVENTS (-MH), FINDINGS ABOUT

message: --ENDY variable value is not populated
description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable value should be populated when End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: --ENDY variable value is imputed
description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable value should not be imputed. It may be only populated when both End Study Date/Time (--ENDTC) and Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) variables values are provided, and both include complete date part.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Incorrect value for --ENDY variable
description: Study Day of End (--ENDY) variable value should be populated as defined by CDISC standards: --ENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) +1 if --ENDTC is on or after RFSTDTC; --ENDY = (date portion of --ENDTC) - (date portion of RFSTDTC) if --ENDTC precedes RFSTDTC.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Invalid dataset name for split domain
description: Split datasets must not have the name of original domain. E.g., lbhm.xpt is a valid name when lb.xpt is not a valid dataset name for split domain.
domains: CO, INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: High risk of truncated value for --TERM variable
description: SAS v5 export format has a limitation on variables length up to 200 characters. If the collected value was more than 200 characters, then SUPPQUAL dataset should be used to store additional 200+ characters. Variable QNAM should have --TERM1, ---TERM2, etc. values for those records. Value splitting should be performed between words or numbers. See SDTM IG #4.1.5.3.2 for details. This risk-assessment check is triggered based on assumption that if original value was truncated, then the actual data value length is exactly 200 characters.

message: No Treatment Emergent info for Adverse Event
description: A treatment-emergent flag should be included in SUPPAE according to the FDA business rule that states, 'A treatment-emergent flag should be submitted'.

message: Missing --CAT value when --SCAT value is populated
description: Value for Category (--CAT) variable should be populated when value for Subcategory (--SCAT) variable is populated.
domains: INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TI

message: Missing --CAT variable when --SCAT variable is present
description: Category (--CAT) variable should be included into dataset when Subcategory (--SCAT) variable is present.
domains: INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT, TI

message: Missing --ENTPT variable when --ENRTPT variable is present
description: End Reference Time Point (--ENTPT) variable must be included into the domain when End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing --ENRTPT variable when --ENTPT variable is present
description: End Relative to Reference Time Point (--ENRTPT) variable must be included into the domain when End Relative Time Point (--ENTPT) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing --STTPT variable when --STRTPT variable is present
description: Start Reference Time Point (--STTPT) variable must be included into the domain when Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: Missing --STRTPT variable when --STTPT variable is present
description: Start Relative to Reference Time Point (--STRTPT) variable must be included into the domain when Start Relative Time Point (--STTPT) variable is present.
domains: SPECIAL PURPOSE (-CO, -DM), INTERVENTIONS, FINDINGS, EVENTS, FINDINGS ABOUT

message: EPOCH variable is populated when DSCAT equals 'PROTOCOL MILESTONE'
description: Epoch (EPOCH) variable value should not be populated when Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) variable value equals 'PROTOCOL MILESTONE'.

message: Missing AE dataset
description: Adverse Events (AE) dataset should be included in every submission.

message: Missing LB dataset
description: Lab Test Results (LB) dataset should be included in every submission.

message: Missing VS dataset
description: Vital Signs (VS) dataset should be included in every submission.

message: Missing EX dataset
description: Exposure (EX) dataset should be included in every submission.

message: Missing DS dataset
description: Disposition (DS) dataset should be included in every submission.

message: Missing SE dataset
description: Subject Elements (SE) dataset should be included in every submission.
