description: Within a Study and a Parameter, all Analysis Range y Upper Limit (C) (AyHIC) variable values must be the same for each unique value of Analysis Range y Upper Limit (AyHI) variable when variable AyHI is populated.

message: None of AyLO, AyHI, AyLOC, or AyHIC variables is present when AyIND is present
description: Analysis Range y Indicator (AyIND) variable indicates the relationship of Analysis Value (AVAL) to the analysis range variables Analysis Range y Lower Limit (AyLO) and/or Analysis Range y Upper Limit (AyHI), or the relationship of Analysis Value (C) (AVALC) variable to the analysis range variables Analysis Range y Lower Limit (C) (AyLOC) and/or Analysis Range y Upper Limit (C) AyHIC. At least one of AyLO, AyHI, AyLOC, and AyHIC is expected to be present for use of AyIND variable.

message: B*IND != AyIND when ABLFL = Y
description: If the record is flagged as the Analysis Baseline (ABLFL = Y), then the value of Baseline Analysis Range y Indicator (ByIND) variable must equal the value of Analysis Range y Indicator (AyIND) variable.

message: Inconsistent value for REGION*
description: Within a study, all Geographic Region y (REGIONy) variable values must be the same for each unique value of Geographic Region y (N) (REGIONyN) when variable REGIONyN is populated.

message: Inconsistent value for REGION*N
description: Within a study, all Geographic Region y (N) (REGIONyN) variable values must be the same for each unique value of Geographic Region y (REGIONy) when the primary variable REGIONy is populated.

message: Inconsistent value for DTHCAUS
description: Within a study, Cause of Death (DTHCAUS) variable values must be the same for each unique value of Cause of Death(N) (DTHCAUSN) variable when variable DTHCAUSN is populated.

message: Inconsistent value for DTHCAUSN
description: Within a study, Cause of Death(N) (DTHCAUSN) variable values must be the same for each unique value of Cause of Death (DTHCAUS) variable when the primary variable DTHCAUS is populated.

message: Value of ASTDT is greater than value of AENDT
description: The value of Analysis Start Date (ASTDT) variable must be less or equal to Analysis End Date (AENDT) variable value.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Value of ASTDTM is greater than value of AENDTM
description: The value of Analysis Start Datetime (ASTDTM) variable must be less or equal to Analysis End Datetime (AENDTM) variable value.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: DOSEU variable is not present when DOSEON or DOSCUMA is present
description: Treatment Dose Units (DOSEU) variable is required when either Treatment Dose at Record Start (DOSEON) or Cumulative Actual Treatment Dose (DOSCUMA) variable is present in the dataset.

message: Missing RANDDT variable when RANDFL variable is present
description: Date of Randomization (RANDDT) variable should be included into dataset when Randomized Population Flag (RANDFL) variable is present.

message: Missing value for RANDDT when RANDFL is Y
description: Date of Randomization (RANDDT) variable value should be populated for randomized subjects (when Randomized Population Flag (RANDFL) variable value is 'Y').

message: RANDFL value is not Y when RANDDT is populated
description: Randomized Population Flag (RANDFL) variable value should be 'Y' for randomized subject (when Date of Randomization (RANDDT) variable value is populated).

message: For the same USUBJID, the ADSL.ACTARM != DM.ACTARM
description: The same subject in ADSL and DM datasets must have the same value for Actual Arm (ACTARM). There must be traceability between ADaM and SDTM.

message: *DTF is populated, but *DT or *DTM is not populated
description: If a Date variable is indicated to be imputated by population of an Imputation Flag (*DTF), that Date variable (*DT) or Datetime variable (*DTM) must have a value.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: *TMF is populated, but *TM or *DTM is not populated
description: If a Time variable is indicated to be imputated by population of an Imputation Flag (*TMF), that Time variable (*TM) or Datetime variable (*DTM) must have a value.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Primary variable * is populated, but its secondary variable is not populated
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables, the secondary variable must be populated if its primary variable is populated. Exceptions: *DTC, *FN, TRTPN, TRT01PN, PARAMN, AVALC, BASEC. Corresponding character and numeric values must also have a one-to-one mapping consistency when the primary variable is populated, which are addressed in other rules.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Inconsistent value for Variable within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of a primary variable (*) for a given value of secondary variable (*N), considering only those rows on which both variables are populated. Covers variable pairs: BTOXGR/BTOXGRN, BTOXGRL/BTOXGRLN, BTOXGRH/BTOXGRHN, ATOXGRL/ATOXGRLN, ATOXGRH/ATOXGRHN.

message: Inconsistent value for BTOXGRN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Baseline Toxicity Grade (N) (BTOXGRN) variable for a given value of Baseline Toxicity Grade (BTOXGR) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for BTOXGRLN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Baseline Toxicity Grade Low (N) (BTOXGRLN) variable for a given value of Baseline Toxicity Grade Low (BTOXGRL) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for BTOXGRHN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Baseline Toxicity Grade High (N) (BTOXGRHN) variable for a given value of Baseline Toxicity Grade High (BTOXGRH) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for ATOXGRLN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of ATOXGRLN for a given value of ATOXGRL, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for ATOXGRHN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Analysis Toxicity Grade Low (N) (ATOXGRHN) variable for a given value of Analysis Toxicity Grade Low (ATOXGRH) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: AVAL is not populated or ATOXGRL is not populated, and ATOXDSCL is populated
description: On a given record, if Analysis Toxicity Description Low (ATOXDSCL) variable value is populated, then both Analysis Value (AVAL) and the Analysis Toxicity Grade Low (ATOXGRL) variable values must be populated.

message: AVAL is not populated or ATOXGRH is not populated, and ATOXDSCH is populated
description: On a given record, if Analysis Toxicity Description High (ATOXDSCH) variable value is populated, then both Analysis Value (AVAL) and the Analysis Toxicity Grade High (ATOXGRH) variable values must be populated.

message: Inconsistent value for ATOXDSCL within a subject and parameter
description: Within a subject, there should be only a single value of Analysis Toxicity Description Low (ATOXDSCL) variable for a given value of Parameter Code (PARAMCD) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for ATOXDSCH within a subject and parameter
description: Within a subject, there should be only a single value of Analysis Toxicity Description High (ATOXDSCH) variable for a given value of Parameter Code (PARAMCD) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: MCRITyML is populated, but MCRITyMN is not populated
description: On a given record, if Multi-Response Criterion y Evaluation (MCRITyML) variable value is populated, then Multi-Response Criterion y Eval (N) (MCRITyMN) variable value must also be populated.

message: MCRITyMN is populated, but MCRITyML is not populated
description: On a given record, if Multi-Response Criterion y Eval (N) (MCRITyMN) variable value is populated, then Multi-Response Criterion y Evaluation (MCRITyML) variable value must also be populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATAR
description: There should be only a single value of Strata Used for Randomization (STRATAR) variable for a given value of Strata Used for Randomization (N) (STRATARN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATARN
description: There should be only a single value of Strata Used for Randomization (N) (STRATARN) variable for a given value of Strata Used for Randomization (STRATAR) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATwR
description: There should be only a single value of Strat Factor w Value Used for Rand (STRATwR) variable for a given value of Strat Factor w Value Used for Rand (N) (STRATwRN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATwRN
description: There should be only a single value of Strat Factor w Value Used for Rand (N) (STRATwRN) variable for a given value of Strat Factor w Value Used for Rand (STRATwR) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATAV
description: There should be only a single value of Strata from Verification Source (STRATAV) variable for a given value of Strata from Verification Source (N) (STRATAVN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATAVN
description: There should be only a single value of Strata from Verification Source (N) (STRATAVN) variable for a given value of Strata from Verification Source (STRATAV) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATwV
description: There should be only a single value of Strat Factor w Value from Verif Source (STRATwV) variable for a given value of Strat Fact w Val from Verif Source (N) (STRATwVN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for STRATwVN
description: There should be only a single value of Strat Fact w Val from Verif Source (N) (STRATwVN) variable for a given value of Strat Factor w Value from Verif Source (STRATwV) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Primary variable BCHGCATy is populated, but its secondary variable BCHGCAyN is not populated
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables, the primary or most commonly used variable must be populated if its secondary variable describing it is populated. Corresponding character and numeric values must also have a one-to-one mapping consistency when the primary variable is populated, which are addressed in other rules.

message: Secondary variable BCHGCAyN is populated, but its primary variable BCHGCATy is not populated
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables, the secondary variable must be populated if its primary variable is populated. Corresponding character and numeric values must also have a one-to-one mapping consistency when the primary variable is populated, which are addressed in other rules.

message: Primary variable PBCHGCAy is populated, but its secondary variable PBCHGCyN is not populated
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables, the primary or most commonly used variable must be populated if its secondary variable describing it is populated. Corresponding character and numeric values must also have a one-to-one mapping consistency when the primary variable is populated, which are addressed in other rules.

message: Secondary variable PBCHGCyN is populated, but its primary variable PBCHGCAy is not populated
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables, the secondary variable must be populated if its primary variable is populated. Corresponding character and numeric values must also have a one-to-one mapping consistency when the primary variable is populated, which are addressed in other rules.

message: SHIFTy is present and all of the following variable pairs (BASECATy, AVALCATy), (BNRIND, ANRIND), (ByIND, AyIND), (BTOXGR, ATOXGR), (BTOXGRL, ATOXGRL), (BTOXGRH, ATOXGRH), (BASE, AVAL) and (BASEC, AVALC) are not present
description: If Shift $y (SHIFTy) variable is present, the variable pair it is describing should also be present. Pairs include (BASECATy/ AVALCATy), (BNRIND/ANRIND), (ByIND/AyIND), (BTOXGR/ATOXGR), (BTOXGRL/ATOXGRL), (BTOXGRH/ATOXGRH), (BASE/AVAL) and (BASEC/AVALC).

message: ASPER is present and APERIOD is not present
description: If Subperiod within Period (ASPER) variable is used in a dataset, Period (APERIOD) variable must also be present in that dataset.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: ASPER is populated and APERIOD is not populated
description: On a given record, if Subperiod within Period (ASPER) variable is populated, then Period (APERIOD) variable must be populated.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: AVALCAyN is present and AVALCATy is not present
description: If Analysis Value Category y (N) (AVALCAyN) variable is used in a dataset, Analysis Value Category y (AVALCATy) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: BASECAyN is present and BASECATy is not present
description: If Baseline Category y (N) (BASECAyN) variable is used in a dataset, Baseline Category y (BASECATy) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: CHGCATyN is present and CHGCATy is not present
description: If Change from Baseline Category y (N) (CHGCATyN) variable is used in a dataset, Change from Baseline Category y (CHGCATy) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: PCHGCAyN is present and PCHGCATy is not present
description: If Percent Chg from Baseline Category y (N) (PCHGCAyN) variable is used in a dataset, Percent Chg from Baseline Category y (PCHGCATy) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: MCRITyMN is present and MCRITyML is not present
description: If Multi-Response Criterion y Eval (N) (MCRITyMN) variable is used in a dataset, Multi-Response Criterion y Evaluation (MCRITyML) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: BCHGCAyN is present and BCHGCATy is not present
description: If Change to Baseline Category y (N) (BCHGCAyN) variable is used in a dataset, Change to Baseline Category y (BCHGCATy) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: PBCHGCyN is present and PBCHGCAy is not present
description: If Percent Change to Baseline Category y (N) (PBCHGCyN) variable is used in a dataset, Percent Change to Baseline Category y (PBCHGCAy) variable must also be present in that dataset.

message: Variable is present, but TRTxxP is not present
description: If any of the subject-level subperiod timing variables (PxxSw, PxxSwSDT, PxxSwSTM, PxxSwSDM, PxxSwSDF, PxxSwSTF, PxxSwEDT, PxxSwETM, PxxSwEDM, PxxSwEDF, PxxSwETF) are present, there must be a corresponding Planned Treatment for Period xx (TRTxxP) character variable present for the same xx value.

message: Calculation issue: BCHG != BASE - AVAL
description: When all 3 variables are populated, Change to Baseline (BCHG) must equal Baseline Value (BASE) minus Analysis Value (AVAL).

message: Inconsistent value for BCHGCATy within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Change to Baseline Category y (BCHGCATy) variable for a given value of Change to Baseline Category y (N) (BCHGCAyN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for BCHGCAyN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Change to Baseline Category y (N) (BCHGCAyN) variable for a given value of Change to Baseline Category y (BCHGCATy) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Calculation issue: PBCHG != (BASE - AVAL)/AVAL * 100
description: When all 3 variables are populated and base <> 0, Percent Change to Baseline (PBCHG) must equal the difference of Baseline Value (BASE) minus Analysis Value (AVAL) divided by the analysis value (AVAL), expressed as a percentage.

message: Inconsistent value for PBCHGCAy within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Percent Change to Baseline Category y (PBCHGCAy) variable for a given value of Percent Change to Baseline Category y (N) (PBCHGCyN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for PBCHGCyN within a unique PARAMCD
description: Within a parameter, there should be only a single value of Percent Change to Baseline Category y (N) (PBCHGCyN) variable for a given value of Percent Change to Baseline Category y (PBCHGCAy) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: APHASEN w has a PHSDT != ADSL.PHwSDT
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the Phase Start Date (PHSDT) variable value must equal ADSL Phase w Start Date (PHwSDT) variable value for that phase defined by the value in Phase (N) (APHASEN) variable. APHASEN = w.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: APHASEN w has a PHSTM != ADSL.PHwSTM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the analysis Phase Start Time (PHSTM) variable value must equal ADSL Phase w Start Time (PHwSTM) variable value for that phase defined by the value in Phase (N) (APHASEN) variable. APHASEN = w.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: APHASEN w has a PHSDTM != ADSL.PHwSDTM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the analysis Phase Start Datetime (PHSDTM) variable value must equal ADSL Phase w Start Datetime (PHwSDTM) for that phase defined by the value in Phase (N) (APHASEN) variable. APHASEN = w.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: APHASEN w has a PHEDT != ADSL.PHwEDT
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) is defined, the Phase End Date (PHEDT) variable value must equal ADSL Phase w End Date (PHwEDT) variable value for that phase defined by the value in Phase (N) (APHASEN) variable. APHASEN = w.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: APHASEN w has a PHETM != ADSL.PHwETM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable is defined, the Phase End Time (PHETM) variable value must equal ADSL Phase w End Time (PHwETM) variable value for that phase defined by the value in Phase (N) (APHASEN) variable. APHASEN = w.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: APHASEN w has a PHEDTM != ADSL.PHwEDTM
description: When analysis Phase (APHASE) variable) is defined, the Phase End Datetime (PHEDTM) variable value must equal ADSL Phase w End Datetime (PHwEDTM) variable value for that phase defined by the value in Phase (N) (APHASEN) variable. APHASEN = w.
domains: BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Inconsistent value for TRCMPGy
description: There should be only a single value of Treatment Compliance (%) Group y (TRCMPGy) variable for a given value of Treatment Compliance (%) Group y (N) (TRCMPGyN) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: Inconsistent value for TRCMPGyN
description: There should be only a single value of Treatment Compliance (%) Group y (N) (TRCMPGyN) variable for a given value of Treatment Compliance (%) Group y (TRCMPGy) variable, considering only those rows on which both variables are populated.

message: TREMxxFL = Y and TRTEMFL != Y
description: If TREMxxFL is included, TRTEMFL is defined as the overall treatment emergent flag. If any Treatment Emergent Period xx Flag (TREMxxFL) variables are flagged Y, then the overall Treatment Emergent Analysis Flag (TRTEMFL) variable should also be Y.

message: TRTEMwFL = Y and TRTEMFL != Y
description: If TRTEMwFL is included, TRTEMFL is defined as the overall treatment emergent flag. If any Treatment Emergent Analysis w Flag (TRTEMwFL) variables are flagged Y, then the overall Treatment Emergent Analysis Flag (TRTEMFL) variable should also be Y.

message: ONTRxxFL = Y and ONTRTFL != Y
description: If ONTRxxFL is included, ONTRTFL is defined as the overall on-treatment flag. If any On Treatment Period xx Flag (ONTRxxFL) variables are flagged Y, then the overall On Treatment Record Flag (ONTRTFL) variable should also be Y.

message: ONTRTwFL = Y and ONTRTFL != Y
description: If ONTRTwFL is included, ONTRTFL is defined as the overall on-treatment flag. If any On Treatment Record w Flag (ONTRTwFL) variables are flagged Y, then the overall On Treatment Record Flag (ONTRTFL) variable should also be Y.

message: ONTRxxFL is present but ONTRTFL is not present
description: If ONTRxxFL is included, then ONTRTFL must be included and is defined as the overall on treatment flag.

message: ONTRTwFL is present but ONTRTFL is not present
description: If ONTRTwFL is included, then ONTRTFL must be included and is defined as the overall on treatment flag.

message: NCAXFN value is not 1 or null
description: NCAXFN (PK NCA Exclusion Flag (N)) must be 1 or null.  It is a numeric flag for exclusion of a record into a PK NCA calculation: 1 = exclusion, null = inclusion.

message: PKSUMXFN value is not 1 or null
description: PKSUMXFN (PK Summary Exclusion Flag (N)) must be 1 or null.  It is a numeric flag for exclusion of a record from a PK summary: 1 = exclusion, null = inclusion.

message: METABFL value is not Y or null
description: METABFL (Metabolite Flag) must be Y or null.

message: ADOSEDUR is present and NDOSEDUR or DOSEDURU is not present
description: When ADOSEDUR is present, NDOSEDUR and/or DOSEDURU must also be included in the dataset.

message: TMPCTDF is populated and ARRLT or NRRLT are not populated
description: If TMPCTDF (Percent Diff. Nominal vs. Actual Time) is populated, both ARRLT (Actual Rel. Time from Ref. Dose) and NRRLT (Nominal Rel. Time from Ref. Dose) must be populated.

message: DOSPCTDF is populated and DOSEP and DOSEA are not populated
description: If DOSPCTDF (Percent Diff. Nominal vs. Actual Dose) is populated, both DOSEP (Planned Treatment Dose) and DOSEA (Actual Treatment Dose) must be populated.

message: DOSPCTDF is populated and TRTA is not populated
description: If DOSPCTDF (Percent Diff. Nominal vs. Actual Dose) is populated, then TRTA (Actual Treatment) must be populated.

message: Inconsistent value for DEVTYGy
description: Within a study, All DEVTYGy values must be the same for each unique value of DEVTYGyN, when both variables are populated. Analogous rule for AD0678.

message: Inconsistent value for DEVTYGyN
description: Within a study, All DEVTYGyN values must be the same for each unique value of DEVTYGy, when both variables are populated. Analogous rule for AD0677.

message: Inconsistent value for MODELGy
description: Within a study, All MODELGy values must be the same for each unique value of MODELGyN, when both variables are populated. Analogous rule for AD0682.

message: Inconsistent value for MODELGyN
description: Within a study, All MODELGyN values must be the same for each unique value of MODELGy, when both variables are populated. Analogous rule for AD0681.

message: Value of DEVIPDT is greater than value of DEVXPDT
description: The value of DEVIPDT (Date Device Implanted) variable must be less or equal to DEVXPDT (Date Device Explanted)

message: SPDEVID duplicate values are not allowed within a study and subject
description: There is more than one record per study for unique values of USUBJID and SPDEVID in the ADDL dataset.

message: BASE or BASEC is populated for a unique SPDEVID,USUBJID,PARAMCD but no baseline record exists
description: Within a given Subject's SPDEVID and PARAMCD, a baseline value is populated (either BASE or BASEC) and there is not at least one record in that group marked as the baseline (ABLFL = Y).

message: Inconsistent value for BASE
description: Within a study, All BASE values must be the same for each unique value group of [SPDEVID,USUBJID,PARAMCD,BASEC] when PARAMCD, BASE and BASEC are populated  (ADaM IG: There must be a one-to-one map between BASE and BASEC within a given PARAM if BOTH are populated).

message: Inconsistent value for BASEC
description: Within a study, All BASEC values must be the same for each unique value group of [SPDEVID,USUBJID,PARAMCD,BASE] when PARAMCD, BASE and BASEC are populated. (ADaM IG: There must be a one-to-one map between BASE and BASEC within a given PARAM if BOTH are populated).

message: Multiple baseline records exist for a unique SPDEVID,USUBJID,PARAMCD,BASETYPE
description: For a set of [Sponsor Device Identifier (SPDEVID), Subject (USUBJID), Parameter (PARAMCD), baseline type (BASETYPE)] only one record can be the actual baseline value, marked by ABLFL = Y.

message: Secondary variable is populated, but its primary variable * is not populated
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables (* and *N or *C) the primary or most commonly used variable must be populated if its secondary variable describing it is populated. Exceptions: *DTC, *FN, TRTPN, TRT01PN, PARAMN, AVALC, BASEC, *LOC, and *HIC. Corresponding character and numeric values must also have a one-to-one mapping consistency when the primary variable is populated, which are addressed in other rules.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Secondary variable is present, but its primary variable is not present
description: In a pair of corresponding character and numeric variables, the primary or most commonly used variable must be present if its secondary version describing it (*N or *C) is present. This is a rule designed to look explicitly at variable pairs defined in the CDISC standard documents. A similar rule that checks custom *N or *C variables (with a few exceptions) is AD1012. This rule is expected to be added to CDISC ADaM Conformance Rules in the future.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Illegal variable name: zz is not in [01-99] for ANLzzFL/FN
description: For Analysis Flag zz (ANLzzFL) and Analysis Flag zz (N) (ANLzzFN) variables, 'zz' is an index for the zzth record selection algorithm where 'zz' is must be in [01-99]. Similar to CDISC ADaM Validation Checks No. 299-303.

message: Illegal variable name: xx is not in [01-99] for an ADSL trial date
description: For ADSL Trial Dates xx variables of form TRxx... and APxx..., 'xx' must be the treatment period (01 to 99). This rule covers 20 distinct variable forms listed in ADSL. It's anticipated that the CDISC ADaM Validation team will release 20 new rules to cover this scenario.

message: Traceability rules not executed due to missing DM dataset
description: When validating ADaM datasets, the DM dataset must also be included to ensure traceability. Note: For the final submission the eCTD structure should be maintained. Therefore, the SDTM and ADaM datasets should be submitted in their appropriate locations. Do not include the DM dataset in the ../analysis/adam/datasets folder.

message: Traceability rules not executed due to missing AE dataset
description: When validating ADaM datasets, the AE dataset must also be included to ensure traceability. Note: For the final submission the eCTD structure should be maintained. Therefore, the SDTM and ADaM datasets should be submitted in their appropriate locations. Do not include the AE dataset in the ../analysis/adam/datasets folder.

message: Traceability rules not executed due to missing EX dataset
description: When validating ADaM datasets, the EX dataset must also be included to ensure traceability. Note: For the final submission the eCTD structure should be maintained. Therefore, the SDTM and ADaM datasets should be submitted in their appropriate locations. Do not include the EX dataset in the ../analysis/adam/datasets folder.

message: Dataset not validated
description: Validation is defined only for ADSL, BDS, and OCCDS datasets. Other dataset structures are not currently supported.

message: Variable value not found in non-extensible codelist
description: Variable must be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist. New terms cannot be added into non-extensible codelists.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER
notes:
Validation of the following variable/codelist pairs will be considered Rejection criteria;

<Variable Name (Codelist Name)>
AESER (NY)
SEX (SEX)

message: Variable value not found in extensible codelist
description: Variable should be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist. New terms can be added as long as they are not duplicates, synonyms or subsets of existing standard terms.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Coded and Decoded values do not have the same Code in CDISC CT
description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Codelist Code value in CDISC control terminology. There is one-to-one relationship between paired variable values defined in CDISC control terminology by Codelist Code value.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS

message: Variable value not found in non-extensible codelist when value-level condition occurs
description: Variable must be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist when its value level condition is met. New terms cannot be added into non-extensible codelists.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS

message: Variable value not found in extensible codelist when value-level condition occurs
description: Variable should be populated with terms from its CDISC controlled terminology codelist when its value level condition is met. New terms can be added as long as they are not duplicates, synonyms or subsets of existing standard terms.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS

message: Coded and Decoded values do not have the same Code in CDISC CT when value-level condition occurs
description: Paired variables such as TEST/TESTCD must be populated using terms with the same Codelist Code value in CDISC control terminology. There is one-to-one relationship between paired variable values defined in CDISC control terminology by Codelist Code value within the same value level condition.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS

message: No records in data source
description: Domain table should have at least one record.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Value for variable not found in user-defined codelist
description: Variable values should be populated with terms found in the user-defined codelist associated with the variable in define.xml.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable in define.xml is not present in the dataset
description: Variables listed in the data definition document (define.xml) should be included in the dataset.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Define.xml/dataset variable type mismatch
description: Variable DataType in define.xml must match variable Type in dataset. Define-XML data types of 'integer' and 'float' match dataset type of 'Num', all other match 'Char'.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable in dataset is not present in define.xml
description: Variables included in the dataset must be described in the data definition document (define.xml).
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Domain referenced in define.xml, but dataset is missing
description: Domains referenced in data definition document (define.xml) should be included in the submission.

message: Incompatible data source
description: Domain table must have a valid format (e.g., SAS transport (XPORT) v.5 or text-delimited).
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER, SUPPAE, AE, DM, EX

message: Dataset is not present in define.xml
description: Datasets included in study data must be described in the data definition document (define.xml).
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable length is too long for actual data
description: Variable length should be assigned based on actual stored data to minimize file size. Datasets should be re-sized to the maximum length of actual data used prior to splitting.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Dataset is greater than 5 GB in size
description: Applicant should consult the PMDA beforehand if the dataset exceeds the file size specified by PMDA.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable value not found in user-defined codelist when value-level condition occurs
description: Variable value must be populated with terms from user-defined value level codelist as specified in define.xml file.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable value is null when value-level condition occurs
description: Variable value must be populated when value level attribute Mandatory='Yes' as specified in define.xml file.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable datatype is not %Variable.@Clause.DataType% when value-level condition occurs
description: Value level datatype must match the datatype described in define.xml.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Variable value is longer than defined max length %Variable.@Clause.Length% when value-level condition occurs
description: Value level length must not exceed the length as specified define.xml.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Define.xml/dataset variable label mismatch
description: Variable Label in define.xml must match variable Label in dataset.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: Define.xml/dataset description mismatch
description: Dataset Description in define.xml must match dataset Description.
domains: ADSL, ADDL, BDS, ADNCA, MDBDS, OCCDS, ADAE, MDOCCDS, ADAMOTHER

message: XML schema validation issue within Define.xml
description: There is an XML schema validation issue with either Define.xml structure or content that is not covered by one of the other rules. It is most likely an issue with element declarations.

message: Missing or invalid <namespace> namespace reference
description: Define.xml must reference the following namespaces: 1) CDISC ODM xmlns="http://www.cdisc.org/ns/odm/v1.3" for Define-XML v2.0 and v2.1 or xmlns="http://www.cdisc.org/ns/odm/v1.2" for Define-XML v1.0; 2) CDISC Define xmlns:def="http://www.cdisc.org/ns/def/v2.1" for Define-XML v2.1, xmlns:def="http://www.cdisc.org/ns/def/v2.0" for Define-XML v2.0 or xmlns:def="http://www.cdisc.org/ns/def/v1.0" for Define-XML v1.0; 3) XML Schema Instance xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"; and 4) XLink xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink". The XML Schema Instance namespace is only required when a local schema is provided, while the XLink namespace is only required when external documents are provided.

message: Missing required <attribute> value for <object>
description: Required attributes must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty.

message: Attribute <attribute> is not allowed to appear in element <element>
description: Define.xml must only contain attributes that are defined in either ODM or Define-XML specification.

message: Missing required <element> value
description: Required elements must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty.

message: Invalid content was found starting with element <element>
description: Define.xml must only contain elements that are defined in either ODM or Define-XML specifications. The elements must also follow the cardinality and order specified in the specifications.

message: Element in wrong position within Define.xml
description: An element was found in the wrong position within Define.xml.

message: Element occurs more than once
description: Element occurs in Define.xml more than once, but it is limited to only one occurrence by the specification.

message: ODM attribute <attribute> should not be included in Define.xml
description: ODM attributes that are not explicitly specified in Define.xml standard should generally not be included.

message: ODM element <element> should not be included in Define.xml
description: ODM elements that are not explicitly specified in Define.xml standard should generally not be included.

message: Duplicate Document ID
description: The ID attribute for Document must be unique within Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Documents as def:leaf elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Duplicate Method OID
description: The OID attribute for Method (the Method ID) must be unique within Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Methods as MethodDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Duplicate ValueListDef OID
description: The OID attribute for def:ValueListDef element must be unique within a single MetaDataVersion.

message: Referenced Document is missing
description: Referenced Document must first be defined on Documents tab. Define-XML specification represents Documents as def:leaf elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Referenced Method is missing
description: Referenced Method must first be defined on Methods tab. Define-XML specification represents Methods as MethodDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Referenced Value Level metadata is missing
description: Referenced ValueListOID value must match OID attribute of def:ValueListDef element within MetaDataVersion element.

message: def:ArchiveLocationID/def:leaf mismatch
description: The ItemGroupDef def:ArchiveLocationID should match the ID of the child def:leaf.

message: Invalid FileType value
description: The FileType must have a value of 'Snapshot'.

message: Invalid def:DefineVersion value
description: The def:DefineVersion should have a value of '2.0.0' for Define-XML v2.0 or '2.1.n' for Define-XML v2.1. The n in '2.1.n' reflects updates to the schema.
notes: PMDA does accept the define.xml version 2.0.0 and 2.1.n only under this validation rule.

message: Invalid Standard Name value <value>
description: Allowable values of Standard Name are: Values from the STDNAM Codelist in Define-CT for Define-XML v2.1, 'SDTM-IG', 'SEND-IG', 'SEND-IG-AR', 'SEND-IG-DART', 'SEND-IG-GENETOX', 'ADaM-IG', or 'BIMO' for Define-XML v2.0, or 'CDISC SDTM', 'CDISC SEND', or 'CDISC ADaM' for Define-XML v1.0. Values must conform to this list of values. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Invalid Standard Version value <value> for <standard>
description: Standard Version must have a valid value for the given Standard Name. Allowed values are '3.1.2', '3.1.3', '3.2', '3.3', or '3.4' for SDTM-IG, '3.0', '3.1', or '3.1.1' for SEND-IG, '1.0' for SEND-IG-AR, '1.1' for SEND-IG-DART, '1.0' for SEND-IG-GENETOX, '1.0', '1.1', '1.2', or '1.3' for ADaM-IG, and '1.0' for BIMO. Define-XML specification represents Standard Version as def:StandardVersion attribute on MetaDataVersion element. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Invalid Term in codelist <codelist> for variable <variable>
description: If the allowed values for a variable are restricted by a non-extensible CDISC controlled terminology, the Codelist referenced in Define.xml must not contain Terms that are not part of CDISC controlled terminology. Define-XML specification represents Term as CodedValue attribute on either EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem elements within CodeList element.

message: Invalid MedDRA Version <version>
description: MedDRA version must be set to decimal value ending with 0 or 1, for example '9.0' or '14.1'. Define-XML specification represents MedDRA version as Version attribute on ExternalCodeList element within CodeList element.

message: Term/NCI Code mismatch in Codelist <codelist>
description: Codelist Term must match the value in CDISC Controlled Terminology for corresponding NCI Code. Define-XML specification represents Term as CodedValue attribute on either EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem elements within CodeList element. NCI Code is represented as Name attribute on Alias element when Context attribute is "nci:ExtCodeID".

message: Required attribute def:ExtendedValue is missing or empty
description: The def:ExtendedValue attribute is required when the CodedValue is an extended value.

message: Invalid def:ExtendedValue value
description: The def:ExtendedValue attribute must have a value of 'Yes'.

message: Missing NCI Code for Codelist <codelist>
description: NCI Code is required for each Codelist that is defined in CDISC Controlled Terminology. Define-XML specification represents NCI Code as Name attribute on Alias element when Context attribute is "nci:ExtCodeID".

message: Missing NCI Code for Term in Codelist <codelist>
description: NCI Code is required for each Codelist Term that is defined in CDISC Controlled Terminology. Define-XML specification represents Term as CodedValue attribute on either EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem elements within CodeList element. NCI Code is represented as Name attribute on Alias element when Context attribute is "nci:ExtCodeID".

message: Unknown NCI Code value for Codelist <codelist>
description: NCI Code for Codelist must exist in CDISC Controlled Terminology. Define-XML specification represents NCI Code as Name attribute on Alias element when Context attribute is "nci:ExtCodeID".

message: Unknown NCI Code value for Term in Codelist <codelist>
description: NCI Code for Codelist Term must exist in CDISC Controlled Terminology. Define-XML specification represents Term as CodedValue attribute on either EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem elements within CodeList element. NCI Code is represented as Name attribute on Alias element when Context attribute is "nci:ExtCodeID".

message: Missing Pages value
description: For Define-XML v2.0, the Pages field is required when Origin Type is 'CRF'. For Define-XML v2.1, the Pages field is required when Origin Type is 'Collected' and Source is 'Investigator' or 'Subject'. Define-XML specification represents Pages as def:PDFPageRef elements within def:DocumentRef element.

message: Missing or invalid page range
description: FirstPage and LastPage are required when PageRefs is not provided.

message: Missing Value Level metadata for QVAL in Dataset <dataset>
description: Value Level metadata must be defined for QVAL variable in each SUPPQUAL dataset. Define-XML specification represents Value Level metadata as def:ValueListDef element, which is referenced from ItemDef/def:ValueListRef element.

message: Missing Key Variables value
description: Key Variables must be defined for each dataset. Define-XML specification represents Key Variables as KeySequence attribute on ItemRef element. The KeySequence attribute must be provided for at least one ItemRef within each ItemGroupDef.

message: Duplicate KeySequence
description: The KeySequence attribute for ItemRef element must be unique within a single ItemGroupDef.

message: Missing Method reference
description: The Method field is required when Origin is Derived. Define-XML specification represents Methods as MethodDef elements, which are referenced by MethodOID attribute within ItemRef element.

message: Invalid SoftHard value
description: The SoftHard attribute must have a value of 'Soft' or 'Hard'.

message: Missing Domain value
description: For SDTM and SEND submission data (where def:StandardName is 'SDTM-IG' or 'SEND-IG'), Domain attribute is required and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Invalid use of Domain attribute
description: For ADaM submission data (where def:StandardName is 'ADaM-IG'), Domain attribute is not applicable and must not be included in Define.xml.

message: Missing SASDatasetName value
description: For regulatory submission data, SASDatasetName attribute is required and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty.

message: Invalid SASDatasetName value
description: The SASDatasetName value does not conform to SAS Transport file naming rules. Allowed string pattern for SASDatasetName is '[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*'.

message: Name/Domain/SASDatasetName mismatch
description: For SDTM and SEND submission data and for datasets that are not SUPPQUAL and not split (where def:StandardName is 'SDTM-IG' or 'SEND-IG' and only one ItemGroupDef exists for the Domain), Name, Domain, and SASDatasetName attributes must have the same value. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Domain/SASDatasetName mismatch for split dataset
description: For split datasets (where more than one ItemGroupDef exists for the same Domain), the 2-letter prefix in SASDatasetName attribute and Domain attribute must have the same value.

message: Duplicate SASDatasetName
description: The SASDatasetName attribute for ItemGroupDef element must be unique within a single MetaDataVersion.

message: SASDatasetName/def:ArchiveLocationID mismatch
description: SASDatasetName attribute and filename (without extension) identified by def:ArchiveLocationID (def:leaf/xlink:href attribute) must have the same value.

message: Invalid Purpose value
description: The Purpose attribute must have a value of 'Tabulation' for SDTM and SEND data and 'Analysis' for ADaM data. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Missing Class value
description: For regulatory submission data, Class field is required and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty. Define-XML v2.0 specification represents Class as def:Class attribute on ItemGroupDef element. Define-XML v2.1 specification represents Class as a def:Class child element under the ItemGroupDef element.

message: Invalid Class value
description: For Define-XML 2.0, the Class attribute must have a value of 'SPECIAL PURPOSE', 'FINDINGS', 'FINDINGS ABOUT', 'EVENTS', 'INTERVENTIONS', 'TRIAL DESIGN', or 'RELATIONSHIP' for SDTM and SEND data and 'SUBJECT LEVEL ANALYSIS DATASET', 'BASIC DATA STRUCTURE', 'OCCURRENCE DATA STRUCTURE' (IG v1.1 and above), or 'ADAM OTHER' for ADaM data. For Define-XML 2.1, the Class attribute must have a value that is found in the GNRLOBSC (C103329) codelist in Define-CT. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Missing def:ArchiveLocationID value
description: For regulatory submission data, def:ArchiveLocationID attribute is required and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty.

message: Missing Description value
description: For regulatory submission data, Description field is required for each Dataset, Method, and Comment and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty. Define-XML specification represents Description as Description/TranslatedText element within ItemGroupDef, MethodDef, or def:CommentDef element.

message: Missing Label value
description: Label field is required for each Variable and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty. However, Label field is optional for Value Level metadata. Define-XML specification represents Label as Description/TranslatedText element within ItemDef element.

message: Missing Predecessor value
description: The Predecessor field is required when Origin is Predecessor. Define-XML specification represents Predecessors as Description/TranslatedText elements within def:Origin element.

message: Duplicate xml:lang
description: The xml:lang attribute for TranslatedText element must be unique within a single parent element.

message: Missing Alias
description: Alias is required for each split dataset (where more than one ItemGroupDef exists for the same Domain) to provide a description for the full dataset.

message: Invalid Alias Context value
description: The Alias Context attribute must have a value of 'DomainDescription' for split datasets (when child of ItemGroupDef) and 'nci:ExtCodeID' for CodeList, CodeListItem or EnumeratedItem elements.

message: Variable <variable> is not referenced
description: Only Variables that are referenced from a Dataset or Value Level metadata should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents variables as ItemDef elements and variable references as ItemRef elements within an ItemGroupDef or def:ValueListDef.

message: Invalid use of Length
description: The Length attribute must be empty when DataType is not integer, float, or text.

message: Invalid use of Significant Digits
description: The Significant Digits attribute must be empty when DataType is not float.

message: Missing SASFieldName value
description: For regulatory submission data, SASFieldName attribute is required and must be included in Define.xml and cannot be empty.

message: Referenced Comment is missing
description: Referenced Comment must first be defined on Comments tab. Define-XML specification represents Comments as def:CommentDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Missing Origin
description: For regulatory submission data, Origin is required for all SDTM, ADaM, and SEND variables. It is at the sponsors discretion whether to provide Origin at the Variable or Value Level. When Origin is provided for each Value Level item, then providing Origin on the Variable is optional. Define-XML specification represents variable Origin as def:Origin element under ItemDef element. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Invalid Origin Type value
description: For Define-XML v2.0, the Origin Type attribute must have a value of 'CRF', 'Derived', 'Assigned', 'Protocol', 'eDT', or 'Predecessor' for SDTM and ADaM data and 'COLLECTED', 'DERIVED', 'OTHER', or 'NOT AVAILABLE' for SEND data. For Define-XML v2.1, the Origin Type attribute must have a value of 'Collected', 'Derived', 'Assigned', 'Protocol', or 'Predecessor' for SDTM, 'Collected', 'Derived', 'Assigned', 'Protocol', 'Other', 'Predecessor', or 'Not Available' for SEND, and 'Derived', 'Assigned', or 'Predecessor' for ADaM.

message: Variable/Value Level Origin Type mismatch
description: When Origin is provided at both the Variable and Value Level, then Origin Type values must match.

message: CRF Origin is not referencing AnnotatedCRF
description: For Define-XML v2.0, when def:Origin/@Type is 'CRF', then def:DocumentRef must match the def:DocumentRef in def:AnnotatedCRF element. For Define-XML v2.1, when def:Origin/@Type is 'Collected' and def:Origin/@Source is 'Investigator' or 'Subject', then def:DocumentRef must match the def:DocumentRef in def:AnnotatedCRF element.

message: Missing Rank value
description: If Rank value is provided for any Codelist item (EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem) within a Codelist, it must be provided for all other items as well.

message: Missing Order number
description: If Order number is provided for any Codelist item (EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem) within a Codelist, it must be provided for all other items as well.

message: Document <document> is not referenced
description: Only Documents that are referenced from a Method or Comment should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Documents as def:leaf elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Comment <comment> is not referenced
description: Only Comments that are referenced from Standards/Terminologies, Dataset, Variable, Value Level metadata, or Codelists should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Comments as def:CommentDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Method <method> is not referenced
description: Only Methods that are referenced from a Variable or Value Level metadata should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Methods as MethodDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Value Level metadata <value level> is not referenced
description: Only Value Level metadata that are referenced from a Variable should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Value Level metadata as def:ValueListDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Codelist <codelist> is not referenced
description: Only Codelists that are referenced from a Variable or Value Level metadata should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Codelists as CodeList elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Duplicate Comment OID
description: The OID attribute for Comment (the Comment ID) must be unique within Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Comments as def:CommentDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Referenced File is missing
description: Referenced File must exist. Define-XML specification represents File references as xlink:href attributes within def:leaf element.

message: Missing Define XSL
description: Stylesheet (".xsl") file referenced in Define.xml must exist.

message: ARM metadata included in non ADaM define.xml
description: Analysis Results Metadata was developed specifically for ADaM and therefore should not be included with SDTM or SEND defines. Analysis Results Metadata inclusion is indicated by the presence of the arm:AnalysisResultDisplays element. Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Duplicate arm:ResultDisplay OID
description: The OID for an arm:ResultDisplay element must be unique within the arm:AnalysisResultDisplays element.

message: Duplicate arm:ResultDisplay Names
description: The name of an arm:ResultDisplay should uniquely identify the display in the report (e.g. Table or Figure number).

message: Missing Required Description Element
description: A Description element must be included in each arm:ResultDisplay.

message: Duplicate arm:AnalysisResult OID
description: The OID for an arm:AnalysisResult must be unique within a arm:ResultDisplay.

message: Missing required ParameterOID
description: ParameterOID is required when the analysis result is based on specific parameter(s) from a BDS structured dataset.

message: Improper use of ParameterOID
description: When ParameterOID is included in a arm:AnalysisResult, then at least one of the children arm:AnalysisDataset elements must be a BDS and the ParamerterOID must reference a PARAMCD variable for that Dataset.

message: Missing required def:CommentOID
description: def:CommentOID is required if there is more than one analysis dataset needed to create the respective result.

message: Invalid ItemGroupOID reference
description: ItemGroupOID attribute on arm:AnalysisDataset must reference a valid ItemGroupDef

message: Missing required arm:AnalysisVariable element
description: At least one analysis variable element must be available for any given analysis result. If there are more than one analysis dataset specified for a specific result, the analysis variable element may be available for one of the respective datasets only.

message: Invalid ItemOID reference
description: ItemOID attribute on arm:AnalysisVariable must reference a valid ItemDef.

message: Missing Context value
description: When any arm:Code elements are provided the language or software used for them should be provided in the Context attribute (e.g. SQL or SAS 9.2).

message: Extended value for AnalysisReason
description: Values for the AnalysisReason attribute are controlled by the Analysis Reason extensible codelist in ADaM CT or Define CT.

message: Extended value for AnalysisPurpose
description: Values for the AnalysisPurpose attribute are controlled by the Analysis Purpose extensible codelist in ADaM CT or Define CT.

message: Missing define.xml file
description: Guidance provided by regulatory agencies states that eCTD submissions must include a define.xml file for each study in Module 4 (nonclinical) and Module 5 (clinical). Note: Refer to the data standards catalog by the relevant Regulatory Agency for acceptance of standards and their versions.

message: Invalid Annotated CRF document name
description: Guidance provided by regulatory agencies states that the Annotated CRF should be provided as a PDF with the file name 'acrf.pdf'.

message: Missing referenced CRF document
description: A variable in Define.xml has the origin of CRF and references specific pages, however Define.xml does not contain an Annotated CRF. The Annotated CRF is represented by the def:AnnotatedCRF element within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Invalid Type value for Method
description: The Type attribute for Method must have a value of 'Computation' or 'Imputation'.

message: Origin for Study Day variable <define variable> is not set to Derived
description: In SDTM, all --DY, --STDY, and --ENDY variables must have Origin set to 'Derived'.

message: Origin for DOMAIN variable is not set to Assigned
description: Domain Abbreviation (DOMAIN) variable should have Origin set to 'Assigned'.

message: Origin for RDOMAIN variable is not set to Assigned
description: Related Domain Abbreviation (RDOMAIN) variable should have Origin set to 'Assigned'.

message: Origin for STUDYID variable is not set to Protocol
description: Study Identifier (STUDYID) variable should have Origin set to 'Protocol'.

message: Inconsistent Origin for USUBJID
description: The Origin for Unique Subject Identifier (USUBJID) variable should be consistent across all datasets.

message: Inconsistent Origin for VISITNUM
description: The Origin for Visit Number (VISITNUM) variable should be consistent across all datasets.

message: Invalid use of Pages
description: For Define-XML v2.0, the Pages field must be empty when Origin Type is not 'CRF'. For Define-XML v2.1, the Pages field is required when Origin Type is 'Collected' and Source is 'Investigator' or 'Subject'. Define-XML specification represents Pages as def:PDFPageRef elements within def:DocumentRef element.

message: Missing MedDRA definition
description: MedDRA dictionary and version must be specified in Define.xml for regulatory submissions. Define-XML specification represents MedDRA as Dictionary and Version attributes on ExternalCodeList element within CodeList element.

message: Missing MedDRA reference on <define variable> variable
description: Variables --LLT, --LLTCD, --DECOD, --PTCD, --HLT, --HLTCD, --HLGT, --HLGTCD, --BODSYS, --BDSYCD, --SOC, and --SOCCD must reference MedDRA dictionary for regulatory submissions.

message: Invalid usage of split datasets for non-general-observation-class datasets
description: Split datasets can only be used for general-observation-class datasets (Events, Findings, Findings About, Interventions).

message: Split and unsplit datasets are both listed
description: Split and unsplit datasets cannot both be listed in Define.xml. For FDA submissions, Define.xml should only list unsplit datasets with split datasets placed in a separate sub-directory labeled 'split'.

message: FATESTCD/FATEST mismatch in Codelist <codelist>
description: When SDTM Event or Intervention qualifier variable is used as FATESTCD, then FATEST should be the corresponding qualifier variable label.

message: Incomplete Documentation for Analysis Results Metadata
description: When an Analysis Results Metadata references an External Document, a description for that document is required. The Document Description is represented as a Description element inside the arm:Documentation element.

message: NCI Code <define codelist code> for Codelist <define codelist> on Variable <define variable> does not match NCI Code <standard codelist code> for Standard Codelist <standard codelist> for Variable <standard variable>
description: When using a standard codelist in define.xml, the NCI code should match.

message: Missing PublishingSet value
description: The PublishingSet attribute is required when Type is 'CT'.

message: Invalid use of IsNonStandard for Dataset
description: The IsNonStandard attribute must not be populated when the dataset is standard.

message: Missing IsNonStandard attribute for Dataset
description: The IsNonStandard attribute must be populated when the dataset is not standard (i.e., does not have a def:StandardOID attribute).

message: Referenced CDISC Standard is missing
description: The referenced CDISC standard must be defined in a def:Standard element.

message: Variable/Value Level Length mismatch
description: The length of a value level slice must be less than or equal to the length of the parent variable.

message: Expected Codelist is missing
description: Variables defined in a Standard with a Controlled Terminology requirement must have a codelist. Define-XML defines codelists using the CodeList element and references to those using CodeListRef elements.

message: Referenced CT Standard is missing
description: The referenced CT standard must be defined in a def:Standard element with Type='CT'.

message: Invalid use of IsNonStandard for Codelist
description: The IsNonStandard attribute must not be populated when the codelist is standard.

message: Invalid use of NCI Code for Codelist
description: An NCI Code must not be provided when a codelist is non-standard (i.e., codelist does not have a Terminology version defined).

message: Missing IsNonStandard attribute for Codelist
description: The IsNonStandard attribute must be populated when the codelist is not standard (i.e., does not have a def:StandardOID attribute).

message: Missing required Alias
description: An NCI code must be provided if the def:StandardOID attribute is set on the CodeList in order to verify that CodeList exists in the terminology.

message: Invalid def:IsNonStandard value
description: The def:IsNonStandard attribute must have a value of 'Yes'.

message: Duplicate Codelist Name
description: The Name attribute for CodeList (the CodeList Name) must be unique within Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Codelists as CodeList elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Invalid use of def:ExtendedValue attribute
description: For codelists that are non-extensible, the def:ExtendedValue attribute is not applicable and must not be included.

message: Missing required def:CommentOID for Dataset
description: The def:CommentOID attribute is required when the value of the ItemGroupDef def:HasNoData attribute is 'Yes'. A comment must be included to explain why no data are present for datasets that were planned for use in the study.

message: Missing required def:CommentOID for Variable
description: The def:CommentOID attribute is required for an ItemDef when its ItemOID is referenced in an ItemRef that has the def:HasNoData attribute value 'Yes'. A comment must be included to explain why no data is present for the dataset's variables that were planned for use in the study.

message: Repeating/IsReferenceData mismatch
description: The value of the Repeating attribute must be 'No' when IsReferenceData='Yes'.

message: Invalid dataset label value
description: The value of the English dataset's description must match the one specified in the CDISC standard for an ItemGroupDef element that represents a dataset defined as following an SDTMIG or SENDIG standard.

message: Invalid variable label value
description: The value of an English variable's description must match the one specified in the CDISC standard for an ItemDef element that represents a dataset's variable defined as following an SDTMIG or SENDIG standard.

message: Referenced Standard is missing
description: The referenced standard (name and version), is not valid or could not be found.

message: Standard '%standard%' is not referenced
description: Only Standards that are referenced from a Dataset or Codelist should be included in Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Standards as def:Standard elements within the def:Standards element.

message: Invalid use of Subclass for Class
description: The value of the Name attribute in the def:SubClass element must be one of the values from the CDISC/NCI subclass codelists.

message: Invalid Status value
description: The value of the Status attribute must be one of the values from the CDISC/NCI standard Status codelist included in the Define-XML Controlled Terminology (C172332).

message: Invalid syntax for Predecessor
description: Define-XML defines Predecessor as a value that is copied from a variable in another dataset. The Description child element identifies the dataset and variable that is copied. To enable other validation rules, the structure of this column needs to be in the form of DATASET.VARIABLE.

message: Missing expected Standard
description: Invalid combination of def:Standard elements found in a v2.1 define.xml file. For SEND, at least two Standards must be defined: (1) where Type='IG' and Name begins with 'SENDIG' and (2) where Type='CT' and PublishingSet='SEND'. For SDTM, at least two Standards must be defined: (1) where Type='IG' and Name='SDTMIG' and (2) where Type='CT' and PublishingSet='SDTM'. For ADaM, at least two Standards must be defined: (1) where Type='IG' and Name='ADaMIG', and (2) where Type='CT' and PublishingSet='SDTM' or where Type='CT' and PublishingSet='ADaM'.

message: XML is not well-formed
description: Define.xml must contain well-formed XML.

message: Missing XML declaration
description: Define.xml must start with an XML declaration.

message: Invalid XML encoding
description: Define.xml must use UTF-8, UTF-16, or ISO-8859-1 encoding.

message: Invalid root element
description: Define.xml must contain a root element called ODM.

message: Invalid integer value for <attribute>
description: Attribute is defined as an integer, but value does not match the integer format. Allowed string pattern for an integer is '-?digit+'.

message: Invalid datetime value for <attribute>
description: Attribute is defined as a datetime, but value does not match the datetime format. Allowed string pattern for a datetime is 'YYYY-MM-DD T hh:mm:ss(.n+)? ((+|-)hh:mm)?'.

message: Invalid SASFormatName value
description: Attribute is defined as a sasFormat, but value does not match the SAS Format naming conventions. Allowed string pattern for a sasFormat is '(letter|_|$)(letter|digit|_|.)*'.

message: Invalid Language value
description: Attribute is defined as a language tag, but value does not match the language tag format. Allowed values are specified in IETF RFC 3066: Tags for the Identification of Languages.

message: Duplicate Study OID
description: The OID attribute for Study element must be unique within a related series of ODM documents.

message: Duplicate MetaDataVersion OID
description: The OID attribute for MetaDataVersion element must be unique within a single study.

message: Duplicate ItemGroupDef OID
description: The OID attribute for ItemGroupDef element must be unique within a single MetaDataVersion.

message: Duplicate ItemDef OID
description: The OID attribute for ItemDef element must be unique within a single MetaDataVersion.

message: Duplicate Codelist OID
description: The OID attribute for CodeList (the CodeList ID) must be unique within Define.xml. Define-XML specification represents Codelists as CodeList elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Duplicate ItemRef ItemOID
description: The ItemOID attribute for ItemRef element must be unique within a single ItemGroupDef.

message: Duplicate Order number
description: The Order number attribute must be unique.

message: Referenced ItemDef is missing
description: The value of ItemOID attribute references a non-existent ItemDef element.

message: Referenced Codelist is missing
description: Referenced Codelist must first be defined on Codelists tab. Define-XML specification represents Codelists as CodeList elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Missing Length value
description: The Length attribute is required when DataType is integer, float, or text.

message: Missing Significant Digits value
description: The Significant Digits attribute is required when DataType is float.

message: Invalid Repeating value
description: The Repeating attribute for Dataset must have a value of 'Yes' or 'No'. Define-XML specification represents Datasets as ItemGroupDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Invalid Reference Data value
description: The IsReferenceData attribute for Dataset must have a value of 'Yes' or 'No'. Define-XML specification represents Datasets as ItemGroupDef elements within MetaDataVersion element.

message: Invalid Mandatory value
description: The Mandatory attribute must have a value of 'Yes' or 'No'.

message: Invalid Data Type value for variable
description: The Data Type attribute for Variable must have a value of 'text', 'integer', 'float', 'datetime', 'date', or 'time' for Define-XML v1.0, and 'text', 'integer', 'float', 'datetime', 'date', 'time', 'partialDate', 'partialTime', 'partialDatetime', 'incompleteDatetime', or 'durationDatetime' for Define-XML v2.0 and v2.1.

message: Invalid Data Type value for codelist
description: The Data Type attribute for Codelist must have a value of 'text, 'integer', or 'float'.

message: Codelist/Term Data Type mismatch
description: Codelist Term must match the Data Type of the containing CodeList. Define-XML specification represents Term as CodedValue attribute on either EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem elements within CodeList element.

message: Invalid SASFormatName value for text Codelist
description: When CodeList DataType is 'text' the SASFormatName should start with a '$'.

message: Duplicate Term in Codelist <codelist>
description: The Term must be unique within a Codelist. Define-XML specification represents Term as CodedValue attribute on either EnumeratedItem or CodeListItem elements within CodeList element.

message: Codelist/Variable Data Type mismatch
description: Variable Data Type must match the Data Type of the referenced Codelist. Define-XML specification represents Variable as ItemDef.

message: Codelist <codelist> is empty
description: Codelist must have at least one item. Define-XML specification allows Codelists to contain 3 types of items: 1) list of Terms (EnumeratedItem); 2) list of Terms and Decoded Values (CodeListItem); 3) or a reference to external dictionary (ExternalCodeList).

message: Codelist <codelist> is missing Decoded Values
description: When Codelist contains at least one item with Term and Decoded Value (CodeListItem), then all other items must be of the same type.

message: IEORRES is not equal to 'N' when IECAT equals 'INCLUSION'.
description: Raise an error when IECAT is equal to 'INCLUSION' and IEORRES is not equal to 'N'.

message: SESTDTC is required.
description: Raise an error when SESTDTC is null.

message: TRLOC is present when TRLOC is not included in the TR domain.
description: Raise an error when TRLOC is present.

message: ECOCCUR indicates dose was not given, but ECDOSE is not blank or has a value less than or equal to 0
description: When ECOCCUR indicates no dose, then ECDOSE needs to be null or > 0; it cannot be used to indicate a dose wasn't taken.

message: EXTRT is PLACEBO, but EXDOSE is not equal to 0.
description: When EXTRT is PLACEBO, EXDOSE must equal 0

message: DTHFL is not "Y" or null
description: Raise an error when DTHFL ^= "Y" and not null

message: DTHDTC is populated but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
description: When Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset is populated then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

message: SSTRESC in SS dataset is "DEAD", but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
description: When survival status is completed as 'DEAD' in the SS dataset then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

description: Every study version must have exactly one study identifier with an identifier scope that references a clinical study sponsor organization.

message: One or more of the window attributes (windowLabel, windowLower, windowUpper) is missing.
description: Timing windows must be fully defined, if one of the window attributes (i.e., window label, window lower, and window upper) is defined then all must be specified.

message: The Timing type is "Fixed Reference" (type.code=C201358) but it does not point to only one scheduled instance - relativeToScheduledInstanceId is not missing and does not contain the same value as relativeFromScheduledInstanceId.
description: If timing type is "Fixed Reference" then it must point to only one scheduled instance (e.g. attribute relativeToScheduledInstance must be equal to relativeFromScheduledInstance or it must be missing).

message: The defaultConditionId and timelineExitId attributes are either both populated or both empty.
description: A scheduled activity instance must refer to either a default condition or a timeline exit, but not both.

message: The study design does not have exactly one main timeline.
description: Within a study design, there must be exactly one scheduled timeline which identifies as the main Timeline.

message: A required biomedical concept property (isRequired=true) is not enabled (isEnabled is not true), or a disabled biomedical concept property (isEnabled=false) is required (isRequired is not false).
description: If a biomedical concept property is required then it must also be enabled, while if it is not enabled then it must not be required.

message: Population of otherReason is not consistent with code - code.code is C17649 ('Other') but otherReason is blank, or otherReason is present but code.code is not C17649 ('Other').
description: If the reason for a study amendment is 'Other' then this must be specified (attribute otherReason must be completed), and vice versa.

message: An instance of a class is referencing itself as its previous instance.
description: An instance of a class must not refer to itself as its previous instance.

message: The next and previous relationships are not reciprocal - the instance is the "previous" instance (parent_rel is "previousId") for an instance that is not its "next" instance (nextId is not the same as parent_id), or vice versa.
description: To ensure consistent ordering, when both previous and next attributes are available within an entity the previous id value must match the next id value of the referred instance.

message: One or more of the window attributes (windowLabel, windowLower, windowUpper) contains a value for a Fixed Reference timing (type.code=C201358).
description: A window must not be defined for an anchor timing (i.e., type is "Fixed Reference").

message: The same instance is referenced more than once as previous or next - nextId or previousId values are not unique.
description: To ensure consistent ordering, the same instance must not be referenced more than once as previous or next.

message: The Timing type is not "Fixed Reference" (type.code is not C201358) but it does not point to two different scheduled instances - relativeFromScheduledInstanceId and/or relativeToScheduledInstanceId is missing, or they both contain the same value.
description: If timing type is not "Fixed Reference" then it must point to two scheduled instances (e.g. the relativeFromScheduledInstance and relativeToScheduledInstance attributes must not be missing and must not be equal to each other).

message: The business therapeutic areas of the study version are not unique - the same code is used more than once with the same codeSystem and codeSystemVersion.
description: Within a study version, if more than 1 business therapeutic area is defined then they must be distinct.

message: There is not a one-to-one relationship between code and decode within a codeSytem and corresponding codeSystemVersion
description: Within a code system and corresponding version, a one-to-one relationship between code and decode is expected.

message: Type is "Fixed Reference" (type.code=C201358) for the timing but relativeToFrom is not "Start to Start" (relativeToFrom.code is not C201355).
description: If timing type is "Fixed Reference" then the corresponding attribute relativeToFrom must be filled with "Start to Start".
