message: The condition does not apply to a procedure, biomedical concept, biomedical concept surrogate, biomedical concept category or a whole activity.
description: A specified condition for assessments must apply to at least to a procedure, biomedical concept, biomedical concept surrogate, biomedical concept category or a whole activity.

message: The StudyArm does not have a StudyCell for the StudyEpoch.
description: Each StudyArm must have one StudyCell for each StudyEpoch.

message: The procedure references a study intervention that is not defined within the same study design as the activity within which the procedure is defined: the parent_id of the study intervention (parent_id.StudyIntervention) is not the same as the parent_id of the activity (parent_id.Activity).
description: A procedure must only reference a study intervention that is defined within the same study design as the activity within which the procedure is defined.

message: The study population is referenced by a study arm but was not defined within the same study design as the study arm: the parent_id of the study population ($parent_of_population) is not the same as parent_id of the study arm (parent_id.StudyArm).
description: A study arm must only reference populations that are defined within the same study design as the study arm.

message: The geographic scope is global (type.code = C68846) and a code has been specified or the geographic scope is not global (type.code is not C68846) and no code has been specified.
description: If geographic scope type is global then no codes are expected to specify the specific area within scope while if it is not global then at least one code is expected to specify the specific area within scope.

message: The study protocol document version has a type of governance date with a global geographic scope and either another date of the same type or additional geographic scope(s) defined for the date.
description: Within a study protocol document version, if a date of a specific type exists with a global geographic scope then no other dates are expected with the same type.

message: A duration quantity has been specified when the duration will vary, or a duration quantity has not been specified when the duration will not vary.
description: If the duration of an administration will vary, a quantity is not expected for the administration duration and vice versa.

message: The biomedical concept synonym value is the same as the biomedical concept name (case insensitive).
description: If a synonym is specified then it is not expected to be equal to the name of the biomedical concept (case insensitive).

message: The relative to/from scheduled instance of a timing was not defined within the same timeline as the timing: the parent_id of the scheduled instance ($parent_of_scheduled_instance) is not the same as parent_id of the timing (parent_id.Timing).
description: A timing must only be specified as being relative to/from a scheduled activity/decision instance that is defined within the same timeline as the timing.

message: The planned age range is marked as approximate, which is not expected.
description: The range specified for a planned age is not expected to be approximate.

message: The unit for a subject enrollement quantity is not empty or coded as % (codeSystem = http://www.cdisc.org, code = C25613 and decode = %).
description: Within subject enrollment, the quantity must be a number or a percentage (i.e. the unit must be empty or %).

message: The schedule timeline does not have a defined exit: none of its scheduled activity instances has a timeline exit.
description: At least one scheduled activity instance within a timeline must point to a timeline exit.

message: More than one code system version is used for the code system.
description: Only one version of any code system is expected to be used within a study version.

message: The study element is referenced by a study cell but was not defined within the same study design as the study cell: the parent_id of the study element ($parent_of_study_element) is not the same as parent_id of the study cell (parent_id.StudyCell).
description: A study cell must only reference elements that are defined within the same study design as the study cell.

message: The activity does not refer to any procedure, biomedical concept, biomedical concept category or biomedical concept surrogate.
description: An activity is expected to refer to at least one procedure, biomedical concept, biomedical concept category or biomedical concept surrogate.

message: The biomedical concept category is referenced more than once from the same activity.
description: The same Biomedical Concept Category must not be referenced more than once from the same activity.

message: The biomedical concept category does not have any members or children.
description: A biomedical concept category is expected to have at least a member or a child.

message: The standard code aliases of the alias code are not unique - the same code is used more than once with the same codeSystem and codeSystemVersion.
description: All standard code aliases referenced by an instance of the alias code class must be unique.

message: The study version has a type of governance date with a global geographic scope and either another date of the same type or additional geographic scope(s) defined for the date.
description: Within a study version, if a date of a specific type exists with a global geographic scope then no other dates are expected with the same type.

message: Planned age has not been specified for either the study population or the cohort, or it has been specified for both.
description: Within a study design, the planned age range must be specified either in the study population or in all cohorts.

message: The epoch is not referenced by any scheduled activity instances.
description: All epochs are expected to be referred to from a scheduled Activity Instance.

message: There is more than one title of the same type code or decode.
description: Within a study version, there must be no more than one title of each type.

message: The scheduled activity instance is referencing its parent timeline as its sub-timeline.
description: A scheduled activity instance must not point (via the "timeline" relationship) to the timeline in which it is specified.

message: The scheduled activity instance references a timeline exit that is not defined within the same schedule timeline as the scheduled activity instance.
description: A scheduled activity instance must only reference a timeline exit that is defined within the same schedule timeline as the scheduled activity instance.

message: The value attribute of the timing is not a non-negative duration in ISO 8601 format.
description: The value for each timing must be a non-negative duration specified in ISO 8601 format.

message: The condition assignment's target is the same as its parent.
description: The target for a condition must not be equal to its parent.

message: There is no exit defined for the timeline.
description: There must be at least one exit defined for each timeline (i.e., at least one instance of StudyTimelineExit linked via the 'exits' relationship).

message: The study version does not have a title of type "Official Study Title" (type.code = C207616 or type.decode = "Official Study Title", both case insensitive).
description: Every study version must have a title of type "Official Study Title".

message: A scheduled activity/decision instance is referencing itself as its default condition.
description: A scheduled activity/decision instance must not refer to itself as its default condition.

message: The lower limit of the timing window (windowLower) is not a non-negative duration in ISO 8601 format.
description: When specified, the lower limit of a timing window must be a non-negative duration in ISO 8601 format.

message: The upper limit of the timing window (windowUpper) is not a non-negative duration in ISO 8601 format.
description: When specified, the upper limit of a timing window must be a non-negative duration in ISO 8601 format.

message: The encounter is scheduled at a timing that either is not defined in the same study design (the parent_id of the timing's parent schedule timeline does not match the parent_id of the encounter) or is invalid (schedulateAtId does not match the id of any timing).
description: An encounter must only be scheduled at a timing that is defined within the same study design as the encounter.

message: The standard code alias is the same as the standard code - the same combination of code system, code system version and either code or decode is used for both the standard code and the standard code alias (case insensitive).
description: A standard code alias is not expected to be equal to the standard code (e.g. no equal code or decode for the same coding system version is expected).

message: The contact modes of the encounter are not unique - the same code is used more than once with the same codeSystem and codeSystemVersion.
description: Within an encounter there must be no duplicate contact modes.

message: The timing has a type of "Fixed Reference" (type.code=C201358) but it is not related to a scheduled activity instance via a relativeFromScheduledInstance relationship - the value of relativeFromScheduledInstanceId is missing or it does not match the id value of a ScheduledActivityInstance.
description: Anchor timings (e.g. type is "Fixed Reference") must be related to a scheduled activity instance via a relativeFromScheduledInstance relationship.

message: The codes of the indication are not unique - the same code is used more than once with the same codeSystem and codeSystemVersion.
description: Within an indication, if more indication codes are defined, they must be distinct.

message: The codes of the study intervention are not unique - the same code is used more than once with the same codeSystem and codeSystemVersion.
description: Within a study intervention, if more intervention codes are defined, they must be distinct.

message: The reference is not a fixed value (it contains "usdm:ref") but it is not specified in the correct format.
description: References must be a fixed value or a reference to items stored elsewhere in the data model which must be specified in the correct format. They must start with '<usdm:ref', end with either '/>' or '></usdm:ref>', and must contain 'klass="klassName"', 'id="idValue"', and 'attribute="attributeName"/>' in any order (where "klassName" and "attributeName" contain only letters in upper or lower case).

message: The governance date has more than one geographic scope defined, at least one of which has type of "Global" (type.code = C68846 or type.decode = "Global", both case insensitive).
description: If geographic scope type is global then there must be only one geographic scope specified.

message: The study cell references an arm that is not defined within the same study design as the study cell.
description: A study cell must only reference an arm that is defined within the same study design as the study cell.

message: The study cell references an epoch that is not defined within the same study design as the study cell.
description: A study cell must only reference an epoch that is defined within the same study design as the study cell.

message: The activity references a previous or next activity that is not specified within the same study design.
description: An activity must only reference activities that are specified within the same study design.

message: The encounter references a previous or next encounter that is not specified within the same study design.
description: An encounter must only reference encounters that are specified within the same study design.

message: The epoch references a previous or next epoch that is not specified within the same study design.
description: An epoch must only reference epochs that are specified within the same study design.

message: The activity references a timeline that is not specified within the same study design.
description: An activity must only reference timelines that are specified within the same study design.

message: AEENDTC in AE dataset of AE where AEOUT = 'FATAL' is not equal to DTHDTC in the DM dataset.
description: End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) in AE dataset of Adverse Event where AEOUT = 'FATAL' should be equal to the Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

message: SVUPDES is not populated or does not exist, but the VISITNUM does not equal a VISITNUM present in TV
description: When SVUPDES is not populated, then the VISITNUM should be equal to a VISITNUM in TV

message: SVUPDES is populated, but the VISITNUM equals a VISITNUM present in TV
description: When SVUPDES is populated, then the VISITNUM should not be equal to a VISITNUM in TV

description: --SCAN must not be present in SEND dataset

description: An administration's frequency must be specified according to the extensible Frequency (C71113) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: An administration's route must be specified according to the extensible Route of Administration Response (C66729) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The schedule timeline does not contain an anchor (i.e., a scheduled activity instance that is referenced by a Fixed Reference timing).
description: Each schedule timeline must contain at least one anchor (fixed time) - i.e., at least one scheduled activity instance that is referenced by a Fixed Reference timing.

message: The duration will vary (durationWillVary is not 'false' or reasonDurationWillVary is populated), but it is not fully defined (durationWillVary is not 'true' or reasonDurationWillVary is missing).
description: If duration will vary (attribute durationWillVary is True) then a reason (attribute reasonDurationWillVary) must be given and vice versa.

message: The scheduled activity instance is in the main timeline but does not refer to an epoch.
description: All scheduled activity instances in the main timeline are expected to refer to an epoch.

message: There is not exactly one objective with a level of 'Primary Objective' within the study design.
description: Within a study design there is expected to be exactly one objective with level 'Primary Objective'.

message: The study protocol document version has more than one governance date with the same type and geographic scope.
description: Date values associated to a study protocol document version must be unique regarding the combination of type and geographic scopes of the date.

message: The study version has more than one governance date with the same type and geographic scope.
description: Date values associated to a study version must be unique regarding the combination of type and geographic scopes of the date.

message: The primary endpoint (level.code = C94496) is not referenced by a primary objective (level.code.Objective = C85826).
description: All primary endpoints must be referenced by a primary objective.

message: Planned sex has not been specified for either the study population or the cohort, or it has been specified for both.
description: Within a study design, the planned sex must be specified either in the study population or in all cohorts.

message: The section number is not unique within the document version.
description: Within a document version, the specified section numbers for narrative content must be unique.

message: The scheduled activity instance has a sub-timeline that is not defined within the same study design.
description: A scheduled activity instance must only have a sub-timeline that is defined within the same study design as the scheduled activity instance.

message: The specified context of the condition is not a valid instance of either the Activity or ScheduledActivityInstance class (the value of the condition's contextIds attribute either matches the id of an instance that is not an Activity or ScheduledActivityInstance, or it does not match the id of any class instance).
description: If specified, the context of a condition must point to a valid instance in the activity or scheduled activity instance class.

message: The code system is "http://www.cdisc.org" but the code system version is not a valid CDISC terminology release date in ISO 8601 date format.
description: For CDISC codelist references (where the code system is 'http://www.cdisc.org'), the code system version must be a valid CDISC terminology release date in ISO 8601 date format.

message: Negative value for --PDUR.
description: Planned Duration (--PDUR) value should not be negative.
domains: BS, CP, GF, IS, LB, MB, MS, MI, PC, PP

message: Missing VISITDY or DSNOMDY values for scheduled disposition record.
description: VISITDY or DSNOMDY is populated in the DS dataset for scheduled disposition records as these are required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for post mortem data.

message: Missing VISITDY value for scheduled disposition record.
description: VISITDY should be populated in the DS dataset for disposition records where DSTERM has been mapped to one of 'INTERIM SACRIFICE', 'RECOVERY SACRIFICE', 'REMOVED FROM STUDY ALIVE', or 'TERMINAL SACRIFICE', as these are required timing variables for identification of the day on which group summaries (Group Means and Incidences) are calculated for post mortem data.

description: An administrable product property type must be specified according to the extensible administrable product property type (C215479) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: A reference identifier type must be specified according to the extensible reference identifier type (C215478) DDF codelist  (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The narrative content text contains non-conformant XHTML.
description: Narrative content text is expected to be HTML formatted.

message: The order of the encounters in the study design (as defined by the next attribute) does not match the order of encounters as referenced from scheduled activity instances in the main timeline that are ordered by default condition.
description: Encounter ordering using previous and next attributes is expected to be consistent with the order of corresponding scheduled activity instances according to their specified default conditions.

message: A planned completion number has been specified for both the study population and one or more cohorts, or it has been specified for only a subset of the cohorts.
description: Within a study design, if a planned completion number is defined, it must be specified either in the study population or in all cohorts.

message: A planned enrollment number has been specified for both the study population and the cohorts, or it has been specified for only a subset of the cohorts.
description: Within a study design, if a planned enrollment number is defined, it must be specified either in the study population or in all cohorts.

message: A section number is indicated to be displayed (displaySectionNumber=true) but not specified.
description: If a section number is to be displayed then a number must be specified.

message: A section title is indicated to be displayed (displaySectionTitle=true) but not specified.
description: If a section title is to be displayed then a title must be specified.

message: The administration dose has been specified without a route or vice versa.
description: If an administration's dose is specified then a corresponding route is expected and vice versa.

message: The administration dose has been specified without a frequency.
description: If a dose is specified then a corresponding frequency must also be specified.

message: There is more than one date of this type for the study definition document version, but at least one of the dates has a global geographic scope.
description: Within a study definition document version, if a date of a specific type exists with a global geographic scope then no other dates are expected with the same type.

message: The administration dose has been specified without an administrable product (either as a direct administrable product or as an embedded product via the related medical device) or vice versa.
description: If a dose is specified, then a corresponding administrable product must also be specified either directly or embedded in the medical device and vice versa.

message: The study role does not only apply to the study version or at least one study design - it does not apply to anything, it applies to both the study version and at least one study design, or it applies to something that is not a study version or a study design.
description: Every study role must apply to either a study version or at least one study design, but not both.

message: All attributes of the address are blank.
description: At least one attribute must be specified for an address.

message: The organization type is not specified according to the extensible organization type (C188724) DDF codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: An organization type must be specified according to the extensible organization type (C188724) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: There is not exactly one study role with a code of sponsor (where code.code is C70793).
description: There must be exactly one study role with a code of sponsor.

message: The study role is a sponsor role (code.code is C70793) but it is not applicable to the study version (appliesToIds does not contain the id of the study version).
description: The sponsor study role must be applicable to a study version.

description: A medical device identifier type must be specified according to the extensible medical device identifier type (C215484) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: An administrable product sourcing must be specified using the extensible administrable product sourcing (C215483) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: A medical device sourcing must be specified using the extensible medical device sourcing (C215482) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The administrable product's product designation is not specified using the product designation (C207418) DDF codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive), and/or neither code nor decode is found in the codelist.
description: An administrable product's product designation must be specified using the product designation (C207418) DDF codelist.

message: The interventional study design's intent type is not specified according to the extensible Trial Intent Type Response (C66736) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: An interventional study design's intent types must be specified according to the extensible Trial Intent Type Response (C66736) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The same characteristics code is used more than once within the study design.
description: Within a study design, if more characteristics are defined, they must be distinct.

message: A unit has been specified for a planned enrollment number
description: A unit must not be specified for a planned enrollment number.

message: A unit has been specified for a planned completion number
description: A unit must not be specified for a planned completion number.

message: The reference to the intervention is not targetting an intervention that has been referenced by the study design as a study intervention.
description: A procedure must only reference a study intervention that is referenced by the same study design as the activity within which the procedure is defined.

message: The study enrollment does not apply to either a geographic scope, a study site, or a study cohort - it does not apply to one and only one of these, or the value for forStudySiteId or forStudyCohortId is invalid.
description: Each study enrollment must apply to either a geographic scope, a study site, or a study cohort.

message: There is not a one-to-one relationship between the referenced section number and title within the study definition document affected by the study amendment.
description: There must be a one-to-one relationship between referenced section number and title within any study definition document affected by a study amendment.

message: The administrable product is referenced both as the administrable product for an administration and as the embedded product of a medical device that is referenced by the same administration.
description: An administrable product must not be referenced as both the administrable product for an administration and the embedded product of a medical device that is referenced by the same administration.

message: The interventional study design's sub type is not specified according to the extensible Trial Type Response (C66739) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: An interventional study design's sub types must be specified according to the extensible Trial Type Response (C66739) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: A study design's intervention model must be specified according to the extensible Intervention Model Response (C99076) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The study design's blinding schema is not specified according to the extensible Trial Blinding Schema Response (C66735) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: A study design's blinding schema must be specified according to the extensible Trial Blinding Schema Response (C66735) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: A study design's characteristics must be specified according to the extensible study design characteristics (C207416) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

description: A study design's observational model must be specified according to the extensible Observational Study Model (C127259) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The observational study design's time perspective is not specified according to the extensible Observational Study Time Perspective (C127261) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: An observational study design's time perspective must be specified according to the extensible Observational Study Time Perspective (C127261) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: TX dataset should include exactly one TXPARMCD = 'PLANMSUB' record per SETCD.
description: For each Trial Set (SETCD) in the TX dataset exactly one Planned Number of Male Subjects (PLANMSUB) record should be included.
ig_versions: SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-GENETOX 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1; SENDIG-DART 1.2; SENDIG-AR 1.0

message: The quantity and text are both missing for the specified duration.
description: At least the text or the quantity must be specified for a duration.

message: The duration quantity is specified while the duration is indicated to vary or vice versa.
description: If the duration will vary, a quantity is not expected for the duration and vice versa.

message: The planned sex includes more than a single entry of male and/or female either by duplications or unexpected codes.
description: A planned sex must either include a single entry of male or female or both female and male as entries.

message: The study role references both at least one assigned person and at least one organization.
description: A study role must not reference both assigned persons and organizations.

message: The study design references the same study definition document version more than once (there are duplicate id values in documentVersionIds).
description: A study definition document version must not be referenced more than once by the same study design.

message: The study definition document version is not referenced by either a study version or a study design.
description: Each study definition document version is expected to be referenced by either a study version or a study design.

message: The study role is a sponsor role (code.code is C70793) but it does not point to exactly one organization - it does not have exactly one value for organizationIds that is a valid id value for an organization.
description: The sponsor study role must point to exactly one organization.

message: The sourcing is defined while the administrable product is only referenced to as an embedded product for a medical device.
description: Sourcing must not be defined for an administrable product which is only referenced as an embedded product for a medical device.

message: The same sub types code is used more than once within the study design.
description: Within a study design, if more sub types are defined, they must be distinct.

message: The therapeutic areas of the study design are not unique - the same code is used more than once within the same codeSystem and codeSystemVersion.
description: Within a study design, if more therapeutic areas are defined, they must be distinct.

message: The study type is observational (including patient registries) but is not specified using the ObservationalStudyDesign class.
description: An observational study (including patient registries) must be specified using the ObservationalStudyDesign class.

message: The study type is observational (including patient registries) as coded by either "C16084" or "C129000" but the study phase is indicating a phase which is not "Not Applicable".
description: If a study phase is specified for an observational study (including patient registries) it is expected to have a study phase value indicating "Not Applicable".

message: The synonym is equal to the label (case insensitive).
description: If a synonym is specified then it is not expected to be equal to the label of the biomedical concept (case insensitive).

message: The strength numerator quantity is specified but it has no unit.
description: If a strength numerator quantity is specified, it must have a unit.

message: The strength numerator range is specified but the minValue and/or maxValue does not have a unit.
description: If a strength numerator range is specified, both the minValue and maxValue must have a unit.

message: The maximum value is less or equal to the minimum value while the unit is the same (or missing) for both the minimum and maximum value.
description: If the unit is the same (or missing) for both the minimum and maximum value, then the minimum value must be less than the maximum value.

message: A reference substance is specified for the substance, but the substance is a reference substance for another substance (the parent substance).
description: A reference substance must not have a reference substance.

message: The primary study amendment reason is 'not applicable' (code=C48660).
description: A primary study amendment reason is not expected to be 'not applicable'.

message: The unit is specified either for the minimum or the maximum value but not for both.
description: For each range, a unit must be specified either for both the minimum and the maximum value, or for neither of them.

message: The same name has been used for more than one instance of the class.
description: The names of all instances of the same class must be unique.

message: Both the text and familyName are missing.
description: At least the text or the family name must be specified for a person name.

message: The id value is not unique.
description: Within a study version, all id values must be unique.

message: The planned duration is not specified for the main timeline.
description: A planned duration is expected for the main timeline.

message: The study design is characterized as both "Single-Centre" and "Multicentre".
description: A study design must not be characterized as both "Single-Centre" and "Multicentre".

message: The eligibility criterion is not referenced by the study design's population or any of its cohorts.
description: Each defined eligibility criterion must be used by at least one study population or cohort within the same study design.

message: The eligibility criterion is referenced by both the study design's population and at least one of its cohorts.
description: An eligibility criterion must not be referenced by both a study design population and any of the cohorts of the same study design population.

message: The unit for the strength denominator is missing.
description: If a strength denominator is specified, it must have a unit.

message: The product organization role does not apply to at least one medical device or administrable product.
description: A product organization role is expected to apply to at least one medical device or administrable product.

message: At least one of the 'appliesTo' specifications does not apply to medical devices or administrable products.
description: If 'appliesTo' is specified for a product organization role, then the product organization role must only apply to medical devices or administrable products.

message: The same intent types code is used more than once within the study design.
description: Within a study design, if more intent types are defined, they must be distinct.

message: The study type is interventional but is not specified using the InterventionalStudyDesign class.
description: An interventional study must be specified using the InterventionalStudyDesign class.

message: The biospecimen retention is indicated as retained (isRetained=true) but information whether it includes DNA (includesDNA attribute) is missing.
description: If a biospecimen retention indicates that a type of biospecimen is retained, then there must be an indication of whether the type of biospecimen includes DNA.

message: The StudyArm does not have one StudyCell for each StudyEpoch.
description: Each StudyArm is expected to have one StudyCell for each StudyEpoch.

message: The eligibility criterion item is used more than once within the study design.
description: An eligibility criterion item must not be used more than once within a study design.

message: The eligibility criterion item is not used in at least one study design.
description: An eligibility criterion item is expected to be used in at least one study design.

message: The reference to the indication is not targetting an indication that has been defined within the same study design.
description: A study cohort must only reference indications that are defined within the same study design.

message: The reference to the intervention is not targetting an intervention that has been referenced by the study design as a study intervention.
description: A study element must only reference study interventions that are referenced by the same study design as the study element.

message: The secondary reason code is equal to the primary reason code.
description: The same reason is not expected to be given as a primary and secondary reason.

message: The study design is characterized as both "Single Country" and "Multiple Countries".
description: A study design must not be characterized as both "Single Country" and "Multiple Countries".

message: The study design has more than one of the following characteristics: "Randomized", "Stratification", "Stratified Randomisation".
description: A study design is not expected to have more than one of the following characteristics: "Randomized", "Stratification", "Stratified Randomisation".

message: --REPNUM is null or is not unique per subject per test per timing variables.
description: Raise an error when REPNUM is in the dataset and there are multiple records for a subject for a test within the timeframe identified by the timing variables on the record, and --REPNUM is null or not unique per subject per test per timing variables.

message: The scheduled decision instance does not refer to a default condition.
description: A scheduled decision instance must refer to a default condition.

message: There is not at least one endpoint with a level of primary within the study design.
description: Within a study design, there must be at least one endpoint with level primary.

message: The parameter name referenced in the text is not specified in the data dictionary parameter map - the dictionaryId is missing or invalid, or the parameter name does not match a tag in any of the dictionary's parameter maps.
description: Any parameter name referenced in a tag in the text should be specified in the data dictionary parameter maps.

message: The id value specified to indicate what the condition applies to does not reference a procedure, activity, biomedical concept, biomedical concept category, or biomedical concept surrogate - either the specified id is not an id for anything (it is invalid), or the instance identified by the id is not one of the expected classes.
description: When a condition applies to a procedure, activity, biomedical concept, biomedical concept category, or biomedical concept surrogate then an instance must be available in the corresponding class with the specified id.

message: The scheduled activity instance references an encounter that is not defined within the same study design.
description: A scheduled activity instance must only reference an encounter that is defined within the same study design as the scheduled activity instance.

message: The study element references a study intervention that is not defined within the same study design.
description: A study element must only reference study interventions that are defined within the same study design as the study element.

message: The displayed section number is not unique within the study definition document version.
description: Within a document version, the specified displayed section numbers for narrative content must be unique.

message: The geographic scope is global (type.code = C68846) and a code has been specified for the specific area or the geographic scope is not global (type.code is not C68846) and no code has been specified for the specific area.
description: If a geographic scope type is global then no code is expected to specify the specific area within scope while if it is not global then a code is expected to specify the specific area within scope.

message: Age is missing for a non-screen failure subject.
description: Age should be provided for all subjects, except where not collected for screen failures.

message: RFSTDTC is not equal to the first EXSTDTC.
description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) should be equal to the first Start Date/Time of Treatment (EXSDTC).
ig_versions: SENDIG 3.0; SENDIG 3.1; SENDIG 3.1.1; SENDIG-GENETOX 1.0; SENDIG-DART 1.1; SENDIG-DART 1.2; SENDIG-AR 1.0

message: The study arm references a populationId that does not match the id of any study population or study cohort defined within the same study design as the study arm.
description: A study arm must only reference study populations or cohorts that are defined within the same study design as the study arm.

message: The number of study interventions defined for the study design is not consistent with intervention model specified for the study design - either the model indicates a single group and there is not only one study intervention, or the model does not indicate a single group and there are not multiple study interventions.
description: If the intervention model indicates a single group design then only one intervention is expected. In all other cases more interventions are expected.

message: The activity references both a biomedical concept category and a biomedical concept, but the biomedical concept is a member of the referenced category or one of its subcategories.
description: If a biomedical concept is referenced from an activity then it is not expected to be referenced as well by a biomedical concept category that is referenced from the same activity.

message: The order of the epochs in the study design (as defined by the next attribute) does not match the order of epochs as referenced from scheduled activity instances in the main timeline that are ordered by default condition.
description: Epoch ordering using previous and next attributes is expected to be consistent with the order of corresponding scheduled activity instances according to their specified default conditions.

message: The item referenced in the parameter map is not available elsewhere in the model.
description: Referenced items in a parameter map must be available elsewhere in the data model.

message: The item referenced in the narrative content text is not available elsewhere in the model.
description: Referenced items in the narrative content must be available elsewhere in the data model.

message: The narrative content does not contain either a child or a narrative content item.
description: Narrative content is expected to point to a child and/or to a content item text.

message: The study version references the same study definition document version more than once (there are duplicate id values in documentVersionIds).
description: A study definition document version must not be referenced more than once by the same study version.

message: The abbreviation's abbreviated text is not unique within the study version.
description: All abbreviations defined for a study version must be unique.

message: The study version does not have exactly one sponsor study identifier.
description: There must be exactly one sponsor study identifier (i.e., a study identifier whose scope is an organization that is identified as the organization for the sponsor study role).

message: The narrative content references a previous, next or child id value that does not match the id of any narrative content defined within the same study definition document version.
description: Narrative content must only reference narrative content that is specified within the same study definition document version.

message: The observational study design's sampling method is not specified according to the extensible Observational Study Sampling Method (C127260) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: An observational study design's sampling method must be specified according to the extensible Observational Study Sampling Method (C127260) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The observational study design's sub type is not specified according to the extensible observational study design subtype (C215486) DDF codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: An observational study design's sub types must be specified according to the extensible observational study design subtype (C215486) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The study design's study phase is not specified according to the extensible Trial Phase Response (C66737) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: A study design's study phase must be specified according to the extensible Trial Phase Response (C66737) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The study design's study type is not specified using the Study Type Response (C99077) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive), and/or neither code nor decode is found in the codelist.
description: A study design's study type must be specified using the Study Type Response (C99077) SDTM codelist.

message: The unit is not coded according to the extensible unit (C71620) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: A unit must be coded according to the extensible unit (C71620) SDTM codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: The unit of the planned age is not specified using the Age Unit (C66781) SDTM codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive), and/or neither code nor decode is found in the codelist.
description: The unit of a planned age is expected to be specified using terms from the Age Unit (C66781) SDTM codelist.

message: The activity references a childId that does not match the id of any activity defined within the same study design as the activity.
description: An activity must only reference child activities that are specified within the same study design.

message: The study role code is not specified using to the extensible study role code (C215480) DDF codelist - codeSystem is not "http://www.cdisc.org", codeSystemVersion is not a valid terminology package date, and/or the code or decode (either as preferred term or as submission value) is found in the codelist (case insensitive) but the corresponding decode or code does not match the codelist value (case sensitive).
description: A study role code must be specified according to the extensible study role code (C215480) DDF codelist (e.g. an entry with a code or decode used from the codelist should be consistent with the full entry in the codelist).

message: Subject has a no record in EX but is assigned to a treatment while participating in an interventional study
description: All subjects that have no record in the Exposure domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product should not be assigned to a treatment.

message: The study type is Interventional (code=C98388) but a study intervention is not referenced from any procedure.
description: Within a study design, if study type is Interventional then at least one intervention is expected to be referenced from a procedure.

message: The previous/next ordering of the activity with respect to child activities is incorrect - the activity has children but its nextId is not one if its childIds, the activity is a child but its previousId is not its parent or another descendant of its parent, and/or the activity's previousId refers to an activity with children but the activity is not one of those children.
description: The ordering of activities (using the previous and next attributes) must include the parents (e.g. activities referring to children) preceding their children.

message: The abbreviation's expanded text is not unique within the study version (case insensitive).
description: The expanded text for all abbreviations defined for a study version are expected to be unique.

message: The study definition document version has more than one governance date with the same type and geographic scope.
description: Date values associated to a study definition document version must be unique regarding the combination of type and geographic scopes of the date.

message: The narrative content item text contains non-conformant XHTML.
description: Narrative content item text is expected to be HTML formatted.

message: A masking is defined for the study role, but the role applies to a study design with an open label blinding schema.
description: A masking is not expected to be defined for any study role in a study design with an open label blinding schema.

message: The study design has a double blind blinding schema (code=C15228) but there are not at least two applicable study roles that are masked.
description: A masking is expected to be defined for at least two study roles in a study design with a double blind blinding schema.

message: The study design has a blinding schema that is not open label or double blind (code is not C49659 or C15228) but there is no applicable study role that is masked.
description: A masking is expected to be defined for at least one study role in a study design with a blinding schema that is not open label or double blind.

message: The item referenced in the narrative content item text is not available elsewhere in the model.
description: Referenced items in the narrative content item texts must be available elsewhere in the data model.

message: The parameter name referenced in the text is not specified in the data dictionary parameter map - the dictionaryId is missing or invalid, or the parameter name does not match a tag in any of the dictionary's parameter maps.
description: Any parameter name referenced in a tag in the text should be specified in the data dictionary parameter maps.

message: The id value contains a space.
description: Id values are expected not to have spaces in their string values.

message: The activity does not refer to any procedure, biomedical concept, biomedical concept category, biomedical concept surrogate, child activity, or timeline.
description: An activity is expected to refer to at least one procedure, biomedical concept, biomedical concept category, biomedical concept surrogate, child activity, or timeline.

message: The number of study interventions referenced for the interventional study design is not consistent with intervention model specified for the study design - the model indicates a cross-over, parallel or factorial design (model.code is C82637, C82639, or C82638) and there are not references to multiple study interventions.
description: If an interventional model indicates a cross-over, parallel or factorial design then more than 1 intervention is expected.

message: DTHFL in DM dataset is "Y" but a record is missing in AE dataset where AESDTH = "Y" and AEOUT = "FATAL".
description: When Death flag (DTHFL) in the DM dataset is populated as 'Y' then a record should be present in the AE dataset where AEOUT = 'FATAL' and AESDTH = 'Y' for the corresponding subject.

message: Variables not listed in the Model List of Allowed Variables for Observation Class should be in SUPPQUAL.
description: Raise an error when a variable is not an allowed variable for an Observation Class
notes: Status: Published | Type: Variable Metadata Check

message: TSVALCD is not a valid code in the CDISC CT version identified in TSVCDVER.
description: Raise an error when TSVCDREF ='CDISC' and TSVALCD is not a valid code in the version identified in TSVCDVER.

message: Variable role specified in the define-xml does not match the variable role in the IG (for domains) or in the model (for custom domains).
description: Raise an error when the metadata attribute of variable role does not match the IG role for domain in IG, or model role (for custom domains)
notes: Status: Published | Type: Define Item Metadata Check against Library Metadata

message: Variable data type specified in the dataset does not match the variable data type in the IG or the Model.
description: Raise an error when the variable type does not match IG Type (for domains in IG) or Model Type (custom domains)
notes: Status: Published | Type: Variable Metadata Check against Library Metadata
